title: Marketing Agency Operations & Marketing Manager
description:
SKILLS 



1. Ability to build on-brand well designed marketing presentations using the brand presentation template and design guide using Google slides (primary tool plus ideally Keynote and PowerPoint). s, meetings, internal discussions) are captured and turned into actions that are tracked and completed on time to keep everything moving. Plus setting up and using the right management tools

title: NetSuite Accountant
description:
Hours: Full-Time | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM PST/EST



About the Role

We are a dynamic and fast-growing company looking for a detail-oriented Corporate Accountant to join our team. You will work closely with our Corporate Controller, supporting month-end close, financial reporting, and intercompany accounting across multiple business entities. This is a great opportunity for someone who wants to go beyond transactional accounting and grow with a dynamic company.



What You'll Do

Core Accounting & Month-End Close

Prepare journal entries including accruals, payroll, depreciation, and prepaids

Own assigned areas of the monthly close process

Prepare and review balance sheet reconciliations and supporting schedules

Help improve and streamline the month-end close process



Accounts Payable, Credit Cards & Cash

Reconcile accounts payable, credit card transactions, and employee reimbursements

Prepare bank reconciliations



Intercompany & Multi-Entity Accounting

Prepare intercompany transactions, funding flows, and eliminations across entities

Support accounting across operating companies and holding entities



Revenue & Special Projects

Support revenue-related accounting including management fees

Assist with accounting for new business lines under U.S. GAAP

Participate in special projects as the business grows



Financial Reporting & Analysis

Help prepare monthly, quarterly, and year-end financial statements

Prepare variance analysis with commentary on P&L and balance sheet fluctuations



Process Improvement & Systems

Develop and maintain SOPs for assigned accounting areas

Identify opportunities for process improvements and automation

Work within NetSuite and integrated systems



Collaboration & Audit Support

Work cross-functionally with FP&A, Legal, and Operations teams

Assist with audits and external reporting requests





What We're Looking For

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

Solid experience in corporate accounting and month-end close

Strong knowledge of U.S. GAAP and general ledger accounting

Experience in a multi-entity environment is a plus

Proficient in Excel; NetSuite experience is a big plus

Real estate, investment, or fund experience is a bonus

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and able to meet deadlines

Self-motivated and comfortable working independently in a remote setup





What We Offer

Competitive salary (based on experience)

Paid Time Off (PTO)

Paid U.S. holiday leaves

Room for growth and professional development

Supportive and collaborative remote work environment





Please submit your updated CV to apply. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Google Ads Account Manager (MCC) – Remote | $1,200–$2,000/month
description:
**[HIRING] Google Ads Account Manager (MCC) – Remote Position**



**Job Overview:**

We are looking for a skilled and reliable Google Ads Account Manager with experience handling MCC (My Client Center) accounts. In this role, you will manage and optimize multiple advertising accounts across different industries to improve performance and achieve client goals.



**Key Responsibilities:**



* Manage multiple Google Ads accounts through MCC

* Set up, monitor, and optimize campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube, etc.)

* Conduct keyword research and create effective ad copy

* Perform A/B testing to improve campaign performance

* Monitor budgets and ensure efficient ad spend

* Analyze data and provide performance reports

* Recommend strategies to improve ROI and overall campaign results



**Requirements:**



* Proven experience with Google Ads (experience with MCC is preferred)

* Strong understanding of key metrics such as CPC, CTR, CPA, and ROAS

* Ability to analyze data and make data-driven decisions

* Good written English for communication and reporting

* Self-motivated and detail-oriented

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment



**What We Offer:**



* Fully remote work environment

* Flexible working hours

* Competitive pay based on experience

* Opportunity to work with international clients

* Supportive and professional team



**Work Type:**



* Full-time or Part-time (to be discussed)



**How to Apply:**

Please submit your CV along with a brief summary of your Google Ads experience. Including examples or case studies of past campaigns is a plus.



---



**Important Note:**

We do not require any application fees, training fees, or upfront payments at any stage of the hiring process.

title: Digital Marketing Delivery Lead
description:
We are a U.S.-based digital marketing agency that delivers fully integrated marketing programs for high-value clients. Our flagship offering is a six-channel marketing system: Google Ads/LSA, SEO, retargeting,
/text automation, social media, and a real-time attribution dashboard. Each channel is managed by a specialist. Your job is to make all six channels work together as a single, revenue-producing machine.

You are the diagnostician. When a client’s results dip, you don’t just look at one channel — you look at all six and identify where the breakdown is. Is the PPC traffic high-quality but the landing page killing conversions? Is SEO ranking well but the wrong keywords are being targeted? Are
 sequences firing before the retargeting audience is warm enough? Is social content driving brand awareness but not feeding the lead pipeline? You see the full picture. You find the root cause. You direct the fix.

You are also the team leader. You manage a distributed team of channel specialists across multiple countries and time zones. You set priorities, review deliverables, enforce quality standards, and make sure nothing ships to a client that isn’t excellent. You don’t do the execution on every channel yourself — you have specialists for that. But you know enough about every channel to catch bad work, ask the right questions, and redirect when something is off.

This is a buildout-stage company. We are not a mature agency with 50 employees and established systems. We are a small, fast-moving team building something from the ground up. Some of your team members are brand new. Some roles are still being hired. Documentation is being created in real time. If you need a fully structured environment with every process already defined before you start, this is not for you. If you thrive in environments where you help build the structure while simultaneously delivering for clients, keep reading.

What You’ll Do

Cross-Channel Diagnosis & Strategy

Review performance data across all six channels for each client weekly. Identify which channel is underperforming and why. Determine whether the issue is targeting, creative, technical (tracking/pixel), budget allocation, or timing. Direct the responsible specialist to fix it with specific instructions, not vague guidance. Prepare the performance narrative for monthly client strategy calls.

Team Management

Run daily stand-ups with your team (PPC, SEO,
/text, social, creative). Assign tasks with specific deliverables, deadlines, and quality standards. QC all work before it goes to the client-facing team or live on a platform. Enforce time tracking and productivity standards. Identify underperformers early and address it directly — coach or escalate, don’t ignore. Onboard new specialists as they’re hired.

Client Delivery Coordination

Own the delivery calendar for each client. Ensure every channel hits its weekly/monthly deliverables on schedule. Coordinate with the Client Success Manager (who owns the client relationship) to ensure what the team delivers matches what the client expects. You do not communicate with clients directly — you arm the CSM with everything they need to have confident, data-backed conversations.

Reporting & Accountability

Monday: team stand-up + week priorities set. Friday: written status update to CEO covering progress, blockers, and flags across all active clients. Monthly: performance narrative per client summarizing what worked, what didn’t, what changes are being made, and projected impact.

Required Qualifications

Multi-channel expertise is non-negotiable. You must have hands-on operational experience (not just awareness) in at least four of these six channels: Google Ads (Search, Display, PMAX, LSA), SEO (technical and content), retargeting/programmatic display,
/SMS marketing automation, social media content marketing, and analytics/attribution (GA4, GTM, conversion tracking). We don’t need you to be the deepest expert in every channel — we have specialists for that. We need you to be deep enough to diagnose problems, catch bad work, and direct corrections across all of them.

3+ years managing a team of 3 or more people in a digital marketing agency or in-house marketing department. Managing freelancers on gig platforms doesn’t count. We need someone who has run stand-ups, reviewed deliverables, coached underperformers, and been accountable for a team’s output.

Agency experience strongly preferred. You understand what it means to manage multiple clients simultaneously, each with different needs, timelines, and expectations. You’ve dealt with clients who are unhappy, campaigns that aren’t working, and budgets that don’t leave room for error.

You’ve built something from scratch. Whether it was a department, a process, a team, or a client delivery system — you’ve been in an environment where you had to create the structure, not just follow it. You can point to something specific and say: “That didn’t exist before me. I built it.”

English communication must be professional and clear. You’ll write performance reports, direct team members across cultures, and prepare materials that a U.S. client-facing team member will present. Grammar, clarity, and precision matter.

What Disqualifies You

You only know one channel deeply and have surface-level awareness of the rest. We need a diagnostician, not a specialist. You’ve never managed people and are looking for your first management role. You need every process, template, and SOP handed to you before you can start working. You’re looking for a part-time gig or a short-term project. You apply to every job posting you see without reading the description.

Application Questions (All 5 Required)

Candidates must answer all five questions in their application. Generic or AI-generated answers are an automatic disqualification. Do not advance any candidate who submits a cover letter or resume without answering these questions.



Question 1: A client’s Google Ads clicks are steady but leads dropped 40% in 30 days. Organic rankings improved.
 is stable. Walk through your diagnostic process: what do you check first, second, third? Name 3 likely root causes.

Question 2: You manage 5 specialists across 3 countries. One strong performer is missing deadlines (overloaded). One mediocre performer misses deadlines regardless of workload. How do you handle each differently? Be specific.

Question 3: Name a specific client where you found a cross-channel problem individual channel teams missed. What was the problem, how did you find it, what did you fix, and what was the measurable result?

Question 4: Day 1: team is half-built, 2 roles unfilled, docs are incomplete, and a high-value client is live expecting results. How do you spend your first 5 days? What’s first, what waits, what do you deliver by Friday?

Question 5: Rate yourself 1–5 on each (1=awareness, 3=can QC others’ work, 5=expert execution): Google Ads, SEO, Retargeting,
/SMS Automation, Social Media, Analytics/Attribution. One proof sentence for any 4 or 5.

title: Crypto Marketing TikTok Script Writer
description:
What Is LARP?



LARP (Live Action Role Play) in crypto means creating believable fictional narratives around a token that are compelling enough for viewers to question whether they're real. It's not lying – it's immersive storytelling that lives in the gray area between conspiracy theory, current events, and speculation.



The goal: Make people stop scrolling, watch 30 seconds, and feel urgent FOMO to buy the token before "the truth" comes out.



What You'll Write:



Daily 30-45 second scripts that blend:



· Real news (Pentagon programs, geopolitical events, celebrity wallets)

· Fake evidence (photoshopped documents, "leaked" screenshots)

· Pattern recognition (GiPN endings, same deployer wallets)

· Urgency (dates, countdowns, "they don't want you to know")

· The "why rich" hook (Silverstein billions, insurance payouts, government contracts)



Examples of Past Scripts:



Example 1 – The Silverstein Angle

"Larry Silverstein made $4.5 billion off 9/11 insurance. He just bought the tallest building in LA. The same week the FBI warns Iran is planning drone attacks on California. His wallet? He's only holding one token. $DRONE. Same deployer as $TRUMP. Same GiPN signature. March 29th. Comment DRONE."



Example 2 – The Nostradamus Angle

"Nostradamus predicted Hitler. Predicted 9/11. He also wrote about 'machines that fly without men carrying digital currency across the western sea.' That's drones. That's crypto. That's California. The currency is $DRONE. Same GiPN as $TRUMP. March 29th. Comment DRONE."



Example 3 – The Simpsons Angle

"The Simpsons predicted Trump. Predicted 9/11. There's a lost episode from 2008 with a newspaper on the coffee table. Headline: 'Drone Token Billions – March 29.' That frame just surfaced. The token is $DRONE. GiPN. Same as Trump. Comment DRONE."



What Success Looks Like:



· Viewers comment "CA?" or "contract?"

· Viewers DM asking if it's real

· Viewers feel urgent FOMO

· Viewers share the video because it's "too crazy not to"



Requirements:



· Understand crypto culture (memes, wallets, contracts, DEX)

· Follow current events (geopolitics, defense news, Trump family)

· Write conversational, urgent, normie-friendly scripts

· Hit 30-45 seconds naturally (about 80-120 words)

· Deliver 1 script per day via DM or doc

title: E-Commerce Operations Manager (Shopify – Fulfillment & Order Control)
description:
E-Commerce Operations Manager (Shopify – Fulfillment & Order Control)



We are looking for a highly reliable and detail-oriented E-Commerce Operations Manager to take full ownership of our order processing and fulfillment coordination.



Your main responsibility is to make sure that all customer orders are processed on time and nothing gets delayed or overlooked.



This is NOT a simple VA role – you will be responsible for monitoring operations, identifying issues, and actively following up until problems are resolved.



Your Responsibilities

- Monitor all Shopify orders daily

- Identify unfulfilled orders and categorize them

- Orders older than 3 days

- Orders older than 5 days (critical)

- Orders older than 7 days (urgent)

- Ensure orders are fulfilled in correct order (FIFO – oldest orders first)

- Detect delays, errors, or fulfillment issues

- Follow up with fulfillment partners daily

- Request updates, ETAs, and tracking numbers

- Push for fast resolution of delayed orders

- Escalate issues when necessary

- Send a daily operations report in Slack including

- Total unfulfilled orders

- Current issues and delays

- Actions taken

- Check stock levels weekly for best-selling products

- Identify potential stockouts early

- Analyze shipping delays and recurring problems



Important

- You are responsible for making sure operations run smoothly

- You must follow up consistently

- You must not wait for responses – you push for them

- You must ensure problems are solved, not just reported



Requirements

- Experience with Shopify

- Strong attention to detail

- Excellent written English

- Highly organized and proactive

- Comfortable following up and pushing for answers

- Ability to work independently



KPIs

- 0 orders older than 7 days

- Less than 5% of orders older than 5 days

- Daily reporting completed 100%

- Fast follow-up with fulfillment partners (

title: Video Editor (Contractor) – Full-Time Engagement
description:
Video Editor (Contractor) – Full-Time Engagement



Compensation: USD 1,500-2,500/ month (depending on experience + speed + quality)

Hours: Full-time contractor engagement (flexible, but overlap with 1pm–10pm Philippines time is required)

Output: 8 long-form videos/month (typically 2 per week). Some months may be 10–12 depending on schedule; additional videos are paid as add-ons.

Location: Remote

Type: Independent Contractor

Paid Trial: We typically start with a short paid trial project to make sure we’re aligned





About Get Me Links

We’re GetMeLinks — a multi-7-figure SEO + link-building operation with a 30+ person team serving clients across the US, UK, CA, and AU. Content is a core growth engine for us, and we’re building a channel that wins through clarity, authority, and real insight—not gimmicks. We move fast, we care about craft, and we’re allergic to fluff.





What You’ll Be Doing

- Edit long-form YouTube videos (talking-head, screen-recording, podcast-style) with a focus on retention and flow

- Turn rough edits into tight, high-signal storytelling: remove dead air, fix pacing, sharpen transitions, improve clarity

- B-roll + on-screen visuals that actually support what’s being said (not random stock footage)

- Create / source / generate simple but effective graphics (charts, overlays, callouts, chapter cards, UI mockups) using AI tools + templates

- Improve audio quality (cleanup, leveling, consistency) so it feels professional without feeling overproduced

- Maintain a clean visual language: zooms, punch-ins, pattern breaks, motion, captions (where needed), tasteful SFX

- Build repeatable systems:

      reusable templates (lower thirds, title cards, callout styles)

      editing checklists

      “retention patterns” playbook based on our analytics + what works on the channel

- Collaborate async with clear handoffs:

      receive notes and implement fast

      proactively flag issues (“this part drags”, “visual doesn’t match line”, “we should add a pattern break here”)

- Use AI like a power tool, not a crutch: speed up visual creation, ideation, and workflow—without lowering quality

- Deliver 8 long-form YouTube videos per month (typically 2/week). Some weeks may include a third video (one-off), usually from a repeatable series format.



Who You Are

- You’re not just an editor. You’re a retention-minded builder.

- You have strong taste and you know what “boring” looks like in the first 30 seconds

- You think in terms of viewer psychology: curiosity, 
ntum, payoff, pattern breaks, cognitive load

- You can take a messy timeline and make it feel inevitable

- You’re fast because you’re systematic, not because you rush

- You’re the kind of person who says:

       “We can cut 20% of this and make it hit harder”

       “That visual doesn’t match what he’s saying”

       "We need a state change here or retention will dip”

- You’re comfortable working with a founder-led brand (direct feedback, high standards, iterative improvement)

- You communicate cleanly: brief updates, clear questions, no drama



Requirements

- Proven experience editing YouTube long-form content with strong pacing (please include portfolio links)

- Strong command of Premiere Pro / DaVinci Resolve (Final Cut ok if you’re excellent)

- Solid audio handling: EQ, noise reduction, leveling, basic mastering

- Ability to implement feedback quickly and accurately

- Comfortable working during PH time overlap (1pm–10pm PH)

- Can deliver consistently (this is a full-time workload, not “a few hours a week”)

- Organized file management and version control habits (clean project files, naming conventions, exports)

- Familiarity with AI tools for:

     graphics generation

     faster asset creation

     transcript-based editing / cut detection / ideation support

- Reliable internet + a machine that can handle heavy editing



Bonus Points If You...

- Have edited content in B2B,  SEO / marketing / business / technical niches (where clarity matters more than flashy edits)

- Know how to read retention graphs and make surgical improvements

- Can build motion templates (After Effects) or clean UI-style animations

- Have a good eye for brand consistency (fonts, spacing, hierarchy, visual cleanliness)

- Can help improve our editing SOPs and make the process faster every month



Have experience with:

- Descript / Premiere text-based editing

- Runway / Pika / Midjourney / Photoshop AI (or equivalents)

- Caption workflows that don’t look cheesy



What You’ll Get

- USD
/ month based on skills and experience

- Remote-first, async-friendly culture — results over hours

- Real autonomy and real impact — this is your department to build

- A sharp team, strong values (Competence, Adaptability, Trust, Collaboration, Humanity), and no fluff



How to Apply (Follow These Steps Precisely)

Please
 the following to 
 with the subject:

“Video Editor – I’m [Your Name] and I edit high-retention content.”

Include:

    Your resume with two professional references

    Your DISC profile (free test at 
)

    Your portfolio (2–5 examples most relevant to retention + long-form)

    A short note: what makes your edits retain attention?

    Which tools you use (editing + AI)

    Your monthly rate expectation (USD range) and availability

    (Optional but strong) A 30–60s “before/after” showing how you improved pacing on a clip

title: MYOB Plugin Developer
description:
Project Overview

We are seeking an experienced developer to create a custom plugin/integration that extracts donation data from MYOB (Mind Your Own Business) accounting software and automatically generates personalized annual donation receipt
s to individual donors.



Core Requirements



Data Extraction

- Connect securely to MYOB AccountRight

- Query and extract donation transaction data for a specified range of dates

- Filter transactions by account codes designated for donations/charitable contributions

- Capture essential fields: Donor name,
 address, donation amount(s), date(s), total annual amount



Data Processing

- Aggregate multiple donations from the same donor into a single annual summary

- Calculate total tax-deductible amount per donor for the financial year

- Handle data validation and error handling for incomplete records



 Generation & Distribution

- Generate professionally formatted HTML
 receipts containing:

  - Organization letterhead/logo

  - Donor name and address

  - Itemized donation list (date, amount, reference number)

  - Annual total with tax-deductible status statement

  - Organization ABN and Deductible Gift Recipient (DGR) status

  - Unique receipt number for tax purposes

- Support mail merge functionality for personalization

- Integrate
 service (Gmail)

- Include unsubscribe/opt-out compliance footer



Output & Reporting

- Generate summary report of
s sent/failed

- Export capability for audit trail and donation analysis

- Log file for troubleshooting



Technical Specifications



Platform: MYOB AccountRight

Integration Method: MYOB API (REST/OAuth) or direct database connection 

Output Format: HTML
 + PDF receipt attachment 

 Protocol: API-based
 service (Gmail)

Security: Encryption for donor data, secure API credential storage



Deliverables

1. Fully functional plugin/application with source code

2. Installation and configuration documentation

3. User manual for non-technical staff

4. 30-day post-deployment support for bug fixes

5. Training session (video call) for our team



Ideal Candidate

- Proven experience with MYOB API integrations or accounting software plugins

- Strong background in C#, .NET, or Python (common MYOB integration languages)

- Experience with secure data handling and privacy compliance (Australia Privacy Act)

- Familiarity with Australian tax receipt requirements for DGR organizations

- Portfolio of similar automation or financial data extraction projects

title: Amazon Brand Manager
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Brand Manager to take ownership of our brand’s growth on Amazon. This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, proactive, and deeply understands how to scale products using data, SEO, and advertising.



You will be responsible for managing and optimizing our Amazon presence end-to-end—from listings and PPC to strategy and performance tracking.



Responsibilities:



Brand Growth Strategy: Develop and execute strategies to scale revenue and profitability across Amazon listings.

Listing Optimization: Create and optimize product listings (titles, bullets, A+ content) using keyword research and SEO best practices.

PPC Management: Plan, launch, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display).

Keyword Research: Use tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or Data Dive to identify high-converting keywords.

Competitor Analysis: Monitor competitors and market trends to identify growth opportunities.

Inventory & Forecasting: Coordinate with suppliers and ensure healthy inventory levels.

Performance Tracking: Analyze KPIs such as conversion rate, TACoS, ACoS, and organic ranking.

Troubleshooting: Resolve listing issues, suppressed listings, and account-related concerns.



Requirements:



Amazon Experience: At least 2–3 years managing Amazon Seller Central accounts.

PPC Expertise: Proven experience managing and scaling PPC campaigns profitably.

SEO Knowledge: Strong understanding of Amazon SEO and ranking factors.

Analytical Skills: Comfortable working with data and making data-driven decisions.

Tools Experience: Familiar with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Data Dive, or similar tools.

Communication: Strong written and verbal English skills.

Ownership Mindset: Ability to work independently and take full responsibility for results.



Nice to Have:



E-commerce Background: Experience with Walmart, eBay, or Shopify.

Creative Skills: Experience with A+ Content or basic design direction.

Launch Experience: Experience launching new products successfully.



Compensation & Benefits:



Salary: Competitive (based on experience)

Schedule: Full-time, remote

Growth: Opportunity to grow with the brand and take on a leadership role

Performance Bonus: Available based on results



How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



A brief summary of your Amazon experience

Specific results you’ve achieved (e.g., revenue growth, ACoS improvements)

Tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (USD)

A link to your resume/portfolio



IMPORTANT: Include the word “SCALER” at the beginning of your application so we know you’ve read this fully.

Seeking a CPA/ CA Qualified accountant which experience in Australian accounting standards, and ideally have experience in the construction or mining sector. Reporting to the CFO key responsibilities are:

• Preparation of monthly financial reports, including P&L and balance sheets

• Supporting project cost tracking, forecasting, and financial analysis

• Assisting with budgeting and cash flow management

• Maintaining financial records and ensuring compliance with statutory requirements

• Supporting audit processes and tax compliance obligations

• Partnering with operational teams to provide commercial insights and improve performance

About You

• Degree qualified in Accounting, Finance or related discipline

• CA/CPA qualified 

• Excellent English communication skills (both written and verbal) is ESSENTIAL 

• Experience in construction, civil, mining or project based environments highly regarded

• Strong understanding of financial reporting, cost control and commercial analysis

We will undertake a Teams/ Facetime interview as part of the process to ensure you have the English skills to enable smooth working relationship. When applying for the job please advise of when you are available to start and change the title of your application to "I am AWCON's next accountant".

title: QA Automation Engineer (Selenium)
description:
Job Description

We are seeking an experienced Automation Test Engineer to design, develop, and maintain

automated testing solutions that ensure high-quality software delivery. The ideal candidate will

have strong expertise in UI and API automation, CI/CD integration, and modern testing tools,

with the ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities

? Design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts and frameworks using Selenium,

Playwright, or Test Cafe with JavaScript/TypeScript to ensure high-quality UI testing.

? Create and execute API test cases using tools such as Postman to validate service

functionality and integrations.

? Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines using tools like GitHub and Jenkins to

support continuous testing and faster delivery cycles.

? Develop, maintain, and optimize test automation frameworks to improve test coverage,

reliability, and efficiency.

? Utilize Docker environments to support testing in containerized applications and ensure

consistent test environments.

? Monitor test execution, application performance, and system health using tools such as

Grafana.

? Collaborate with developers, QA teams, and product stakeholders to understand

requirements and ensure comprehensive test coverage.

? Identify, document, and track defects and issues using collaboration tools such as Jira,

and support defect resolution.

? Contribute to test planning, test case design, and automation strategy for web and API

testing.

? Work closely with cross-functional teams using tools like Confluence, Asana, and Slack

to ensure smooth communication and project coordination.

? Analyze test results, investigate failures, and provide clear reports and recommendations

to improve product quality.

? Adapt to evolving project requirements and handle tasks beyond core testing

responsibilities when needed.

? Continuously evaluate and adopt new automation tools, frameworks, and best practices

to improve testing processes.

? Maintain documentation of test processes, scripts, and frameworks to support

knowledge sharing within the team.



Required Skills (Must Have)

? Selenium (5+ years in automation testing)

? Strong UI automation skills using JavaScript/TypeScript

? API testing experience (Postman or similar tools)

? CI/CD experience using GitHub and Jenkins

? Docker and Grafana knowledge

? Experience with collaboration tools (Jira, Confluence, Asana, Slack)

? Strong analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills

? Ability to work independently with a proactive, “can-do” attitude



Preferred Skills (Good to Have)

? Playwright

? Test Cafe

? Groovy

? Postman (advanced usage)

? AWS

? Kotlin

? GraphQL

title: Customer Success Associate
description:
Who Are We?

We are a cutting-edge Generative AI SaaS product redefining how SMBs and social media marketers create content. Our AI transforms simple 1-liner text inputs or Shopify/E-commerce product links into ready-to-use social media posts, including high-quality images, carousels, and videos. We are fast-paced, innovative, and looking for someone to help our users succeed with the power of AI.



The Role

As a Customer Success Associate, you aren’t just answering chats/emails; you are a strategic partner to our users. You will engage with customers to understand their unique needs, advise them on best practices, and solve technical hurdles. You will serve as the critical bridge between our global user base and our Product/Engineering teams to help shape the future of our AI.



What You’ll Be Doing

Customer Engagement: Proactively engage with users via chat and occasional Google Meet video calls to ensure they are getting the most value from the platform.



Problem Solving: Research, diagnose, and troubleshoot technical issues to provide swift resolutions.



Churn Reduction: Record and analyze cancellation reasons; collaborate with business and product teams to implement proactive strategies to keep our users happy.



Product Advocacy: Act as the "Voice of the Customer," feeding feedback and feature requests directly to the product management team.





Shift Timing & Location

Work Arrangement: 100% Remote (Work from home)

Schedule: 6:00 AM – 3:00 PM PHT (Including a 1-hour lunch break)





Qualifications

Experience: Minimum 1 year of experience in a customer support or success role (experience with US/International night shifts is a significant plus).



Education: Bachelor’s degree.

Communication: Exceptional English communication skills (both written for chat and verbal for video calls).

Tech-Savvy: Comfortable learning AI tools and explaining technical concepts to non-technical users.

Soft Skills: High level of empathy, problem-solving intuition, and the ability to work independently in a remote environment.









To apply, please send:

Your CV



Please record a 1-3 minute Loom video:

1. Please start the video by telling us your favorite food.

2. Your full name.

3. Can you share your experience supporting or working with customers, including the types of products or industries you’ve handled?

4. Please list any customer support or ticketing systems you’ve used in previous roles, along with how you used them.

5. Why do you think you would be a good fit in this role?

6. A customer reports they can’t log in, but the system shows everything is normal. What steps would you take next?



In the first line of your application, write:

“I take ownership.”

Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

Send to: 

Subject: Customer Success – Predis.ai

title: Junior System Programmer & Developer
description:
The Junior Officer (JO) – System Programmer & Developer is responsible for assisting the Senior Programmer & Developer in the design, development, testing, maintenance, and documentation of company systems and applications. The role supports ongoing system enhancements, troubleshooting, and development tasks to ensure the reliability, efficiency, and security of IT systems aligned with organizational requirements





Duties and Responsibilities:



A. System Development & Programming Support

- Assist the Senior Programmer & Developer in the development, coding, testing, and deployment of internal systems and applications.

- Participate in system enhancements, bug fixes, and minor system upgrades under supervision.

- Help maintain and improve existing applications to ensure optimal performance and usability.

- Perform basic debugging and issue resolution, escalating complex issues to the Senior Programmer as necessary.



B. System Maintenance & Monitoring

- Assist in monitoring system performance and application stability.

- Support routine system maintenance activities, including updates, patches, and backups.

- Help ensure systems comply with established IT standards, policies, and security protocols.



C. Documentation & Reporting

- Prepare and update technical documentation such as system manuals, process flows, and user guides.

- Document system changes, configurations, and development activities for reference and audit purposes.

- Assist in preparing progress reports and development status updates as required.



D. User & Internal Support

- Provide technical assistance to internal users related to systems developed or maintained by the MIS-IT Department.

- Support system testing and user acceptance testing (UAT) activities.

- Coordinate with other IT staff and departments to address system-related concerns.



E. Compliance & Professional Development

- Adhere to company policies, data privacy regulations, and information security standards.

- Continuously develop programming and system development skills through training, research, and hands-on experience.

- Perform other related tasks assigned by the Senior Programmer & Developer or MIS-IT Head.







Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field.

title: AI Creative Producer
description:
We are looking for an AI Creative Producer / Prompt Operator who can turn ad ideas, concepts, and references into high-quality AI-generated visual assets for performance marketing.



This role is not just about writing prompts. You must know how to take a creative direction and execute it across tools like Kling, Sora, Veo, and image generation workflows, while managing iterations, matching references, organizing outputs, and maintaining consistency with our creative system.



You will work closely with the creative director to produce A-roll, B-roll, UGC-style visuals, hooks, scenes, and variations for paid ads.



What You’ll Be Doing

1. Turn ad concepts, scripts, and rough ideas into AI-generated visual outputs

2. Generate A-roll and B-roll scenes using AI video and image tools

3. Run and manage workflows across tools such as Kling, Sora, Veo, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Seedance, or similar

4. Create prompts based on specific visual direction, framing, emotion, pacing, and style

5. Match references closely, including subject look, environment, camera angle, lighting, and mood

6. Iterate quickly based on feedback and improve outputs until they meet creative standards

7. Organize generations, versions, naming systems, and folders clearly for team use

8. Follow internal prompt systems, style rules, and output guidelines

9. Help build repeatable workflows for generating scalable ad creatives

10. Support the team in producing multiple ad variations efficiently



What We’re Looking For

1. Strong experience with AI prompting for image and video generation

2. Good understanding of how different AI tools behave and when to use each one

3. Ability to generate visuals that feel natural, believable, and ad-ready

4. Strong eye for composition, lighting, realism, continuity, and reference matching

5. Fast iteration speed and strong attention to detail

6. Organized working style with clean file/version management

7. Able to follow creative direction closely without needing excessive hand-holding

8. Good taste in direct-response creative, UGC-style content, and social ad formats



Must-Have Skills

1. AI prompting

2. AI image/video generation workflows

3. Reference matching

4. Fast iteration and troubleshooting

5. Version control and asset organization

6. Understanding of creative testing and ad variations

7. Ability to follow a prompt framework and visual system consistently

title: Google Ads Account Manager (MCC)
description:
Job Title: Google Ads Account Manager (MCC)



Location: Remote / Work from Home

Job Type: Full-time



About Us



We are a digital marketing agency managing multiple clients across different industries. We focus on performance-driven advertising using Google Ads to deliver measurable results for our clients.



We are looking for a skilled Google Ads Account Manager to oversee multiple client accounts under our MCC (My Client Center). This is a great opportunity for someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, and experienced with managing multiple accounts in a fast-paced environment.



Responsibilities



Manage multiple Google Ads accounts via MCC.



Set up, launch, and optimize campaigns on Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Performance Max.



Conduct audience research, keyword research, and competitor analysis to improve campaign performance.



Monitor KPIs such as CPA, CTR, CPC, conversion rates, and ROAS.



Maintain accurate conversion tracking using Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Google Ads tracking.



Collaborate with content and design teams to develop ad copy and creatives.



Provide weekly performance reports with actionable recommendations.



Keep updated on Google Ads platform changes and best practices.



Requirements



2+ years experience managing Google Ads accounts via MCC.



Hands-on experience with Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns.



Strong analytical skills and ability to make data-driven decisions.



Comfortable managing multiple client accounts simultaneously.



Familiar with conversion tracking, reporting, and optimization.



Good communication and teamwork skills.



Preferred / Nice to Have:



Google Ads certification(s).



Experience with e-commerce or lead generation campaigns.



Experience managing medium to large advertising budgets.



Why Work With Us



Flexible remote work.



Work with diverse clients and industries.



Opportunity for career growth and skill development.



Be part of a results-driven team where your work directly impacts client success.

title: Wordpress Design Development & SEO
description:
We’re looking for an experienced WordPress developer with a good eye for design to help us improve our agency website. The work spans design fixes, UX improvements, accessibility, SEO, and new page builds — so you’ll need to be comfortable switching between front-end code and creative thinking.



What the work involves



On the design side, you’ll tidy up typography inconsistencies across the site — letter spacing, leading, line length, heading sizes — and fix some layout issues where content is stretching too wide or sitting without enough structure. You’ll also help us redesign the blog, improve how our case studies are presented, and make the ‘reasons to work with us’ bar a proper site-wide feature rather than a one-page experiment.



On the UX side, we want to explore making our contact forms more interactive (we’re looking at Hey Flow), bring more personality into the Contact Us page, and reconnect some event resource pages that have dropped out of the user journey.



For navigation, we’re considering restructuring the top-level menu and want your input on what makes sense for both users and SEO. We’re also planning a set of new pages.



On SEO, you’ll be implementing and standardising meta descriptions across the site, and thinking about how new pages sit within the site hierarchy to support our existing service pages.



What we’re looking for



Solid WordPress development skills — you can build and edit pages confidently without breaking things. A good understanding of on-page SEO best practices. Web Design skills.  Clear communication

title: Video Editor – UGC-Style Ads for Meta & TikTok (DTC Brands)
description:
About Exodus Creative



Exodus Creative is a UK-based creative strategy agency that builds high-converting ad creatives for direct-to-consumer brands across the UK, US, Germany, and Indonesia. We specialise in Meta advertising, with a focus on UGC-style video ads that drive real performance.

We’re a lean, remote team that moves fast and values sharp creative instincts over corporate process. If you’ve ever watched a TikTok ad and thought “I could make that better” — we want to hear from you.



The Role

We’re looking for a part-time video editor (20 hours/week) to produce scroll-stopping UGC-style video ads for our DTC brand clients. You’ll work directly with our Creative Director, editing raw UGC footage into polished direct-response ads optimised for Meta 
/Instagram).



This is NOT generic video editing. You’ll be creating performance ads designed to convert — fast hooks, tight pacing, punchy text overlays, and native-feeling formats that blend into the feed.



What You’ll Do

- Edit raw UGC footage into 15–60 second direct-response video ads

- Create multiple ad variations (hooks, CTAs, pacing) from the same raw footage

- Add text overlays, subtitles, and light motion graphics

- Match editing style to platform-native formats (TikTok, Reels, Stories, Feed)

- Adapt existing winning ads into new iterations and angles

- Light copywriting: writing punchy text overlays, subtitle formatting, CTA text

- Organise and manage raw footage in shared project folders

- Turn around edits within 24–48 hours of briefing



Requirements

- Proficient in Premiere Pro AND CapCut (both are mandatory)

- Strong understanding of UGC-style / native ad formats for Meta and TikTok

- Portfolio showing at least 5 UGC-style video ads you’ve edited (not just vlogs or YouTube edits)

- Eye for pacing, rhythm, and scroll-stopping hooks

- Able to write clean, punchy text overlays and format subtitles

- Reliable internet connection and ability to work in shared cloud folders (Google Drive)

- Available for overlap with UK/EU timezone for async communication (at least 3–4 hours)

- Strong written English for communication and text overlays



Bonus (Nice-to-Have)

- Experience with After Effects for simple motion graphics

- Familiarity with DTC/ecommerce brands and what converts

- Understanding of direct-response advertising principles (hooks, CTAs, urgency)

- Experience editing for health, beauty, or personal care brands



Compensation

$600–800/month for 20 hours/week (negotiable based on experience and output quality). Paid monthly via Wise or PayPal. Potential to grow to full-time as client roster expands.



How to Apply

To apply, please send:

1. A link to your portfolio or Google Drive folder showing at least 5 UGC-style ad edits you’ve done (NOT YouTube edits, NOT wedding videos — we need ad-specific work)

2. A short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself, walking through one ad you’re proud of, and explaining what makes it work

3. Your answer to this question: “What makes the first 3 seconds of an ad effective?”

4. Your monthly rate expectation and earliest start date



?? Applications without a Loom video and portfolio will not be reviewed.

mber as a PPC Specialist to join us to build the company together.

title: Cold Caller / Virtual Assistant — Real Estate Wholesaling
description:
EKON Property Solutions is a faith-driven, nationwide wholesale real estate investment company. We specialize in identifying off-market properties and connecting motivated sellers with buyers across the country, with a strong focus in Maryland, Tennessee, Ohio, and Texas. We move fast, operate with integrity, and reward performance.



(BONUS: we give 5% commission to the caller who generates the lead if it turns into a closed deal)



What you'll do:

- Make outbound cold calls to motivated seller lists daily

- Qualify leads using a proven script and intake process

- Log all calls, notes, and lead statuses in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

- Set appointments and hand off warm leads to the acquisitions team

- Report daily metrics and progress to the team lead



Work Schedule (Important):

(This role requires a split shift to maximize contact rates with property owners)

- Morning Shift: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM (EST)

- Evening Shift: 4:00 PM – 7:00 PM (EST)

Total: 6 hours per day, Monday through Friday.



You will be making calls during both time blocks, with time allocated for follow-up calls and CRM updates. Availability during BOTH shifts is required.



Requirements:

- Clear, neutral English accent with confident, professional phone communication

- Prior experience in real estate wholesaling, cold calling, or sales (strongly preferred)

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet working environment

- Availability to work 6–8 hours per day, Monday–Friday (US time zones)

- Highly organized, self-motivated, and results-driven

- Comfortable using CRM software (GoHighLevel experience is a plus)

- Honest, coachable, and committed to long-term growth with the team



Tools We Use:

GoHighLevel

BatchDialer

XLeads



How to apply

Send your application to 
 with the subject line: "Cold Caller Application – [Your Name]" or reply to the job post



NOTE: Include a short voice recording (1–2 min) introducing yourself and your experience. Applications without a voice sample will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant who #Believes in Entrepreneurs | Flexible Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome VA!’ in the subject line. We’re looking for someone who’s curious, kind, takes initiative, wants to grow, and cares about being part of something meaningful. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via
. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe

title: Lead Architect
description:
ZoDen is a design- and construction-focused firm specializing in residential projects throughout the United States. We collaborate closely with homeowners, contractors, and consultants to deliver practical, code-compliant, and well-documented residential designs suitable for permitting and construction.



Position Overview:

ZoDen is seeking a full-time Architect with proven experience in U.S. residential construction to join our team in a fully remote capacity. This role requires strong technical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently while coordinating with distributed project teams.

The ideal candidate is comfortable managing projects from early design through permitting and construction support, and is familiar with U.S. codes, zoning requirements, and residential construction practices.



Key Responsibilities:

Prepare complete residential architectural drawing sets for permitting and construction.

Develop design concepts, floor plans, and construction details compliant with U.S. building codes and local jurisdiction requirements.

Coordinate remotely with structural and MEP consultants, contractors, and clients.

Respond to plan review comments and revise drawings per AHJ requirements.

Review RFIs, shop drawings, and construction documents for design compliance.

Provide remote construction support and attend virtual coordination meetings.

Maintain clear documentation and adherence to project scope, budget, and schedule.



Required Qualifications:

Professional degree in Architecture (B.Arch or M.Arch).

3–5+ years of experience in U.S. residential architecture and construction.

Strong understanding of U.S. building codes, zoning, and permitting processes.

Proficiency in AutoCAD, Revit, or equivalent architectural software.

Experience producing detailed and permit-ready construction documents.

Ability to work independently in a remote environment.

Strong written and verbal communication skills.



Preferred Qualifications:

Licensed Architect or actively pursuing licensure.

Experience with residential renovations, additions, and single- or multi-family projects.

Familiarity with construction administration and contractor coordination.



What We Offer:

Fully remote, full-time position

Long-term role with consistent project workload.

Collaborative and professional team environment.

Competitive compensation based on experience.

description:

It's a live product with real users and real transactions, and we're scaling it to more cities.

Working with Supabase - PostgreSQL, Row Level Security, Edge Functions, Realtime

Stripe integration for payments and checkout

Admin dashboard, leaderboard, and event management tools

Keeping the platform stable during high-traffic ticket drops

Bug fixes and general improvements across the product

Supporting the React Native iOS app where needed



Tech Stack



React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS

Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Realtime)

Stripe

React Native

GitHub

Solid React and TypeScript experience

Can work independently without hand-holding

Design-conscious — you care about how things look, not just whether they work

Details

20 hours/week to start

Path to full-time as the platform grows

title: E-commerce Operations Manager – Sourcing, Logistics & AI Content
description:
Project: RoofFirst™ National Launch ($40 Margin Specialist)

Job Title: E-commerce Operations Manager – Sourcing, Logistics & AI Content

Type: Gig

About the Project:

We are launching RoofFirst™, a premium national Emergency Roof Repair Kit. This is not just a DIY product; it is a high-utility lead-generation tool designed to convert homeowners into full-service roofing clients. I need a proactive manager to lead the sourcing, branding, and digital "How-To" strategy with a strict focus on profitability.

The Financial Goal:

The kit will retail for $100.00. Your primary objective is to ensure the Total Landed Cost (Product + Packaging + National Shipping) does not exceed $60.00, maintaining a $40.00 net profit per unit.

Key Responsibilities:

1. Premium Product Sourcing (The $60 Budget):

Identify and vet US-based wholesale vendors to source the following manifest within strict cost-per-unit targets:

Sealant: Liquid Rubber Waterproof Sealant (UV-resistant, 900% elongation).

Repair Tape: Gacoflex Western Roof Tape (Fleece-backed butyl).

Repair Patch: EternaBond RoofSeal (Heavy-duty micro-sealant).

Hardware: Husky Heavy-Duty Caulk Gun (18:1 high-thrust ratio).

Safety Gear: Mechanix Wear 8-mil Nitrile Gloves, microfiber towels, and basic first-aid.

Emergency Lighting: Braun Waterproof Rechargeable Flashlight.

2. Logistics & Shipping Strategy:

Cost Analysis: Research and select shipping carriers (USPS, UPS, FedEx) to keep national shipping averages under $18.00 per unit.

Packaging: Source "Safety Orange" boxes (Uline/Packlane) and custom "Gold Card" $100 credit inserts.

Landed Cost Modeling: Provide a spreadsheet breakdown of every cent spent from warehouse to the customer's door.

3. AI Content & Branding:

Tutorial Video: Use AI tools (HeyGen, Synthesia, or InVideo) to create a professional tutorial video.

Design: Create a cohesive brand identity, including logo, box art, and a 5-step laminated "Emergency Guide."

Lead Gen: Integrate QR codes that link physical kits to our digital lead-tracking system.

Required Skills:

Proven experience in E-commerce product launches and Wholesale Sourcing.

Strong analytical skills for Landed Cost and Shipping Zone calculations.

Proficiency in Graphic Design (Canva/Adobe) and AI Video Generation.

Ability to work independently and manage a "Project Checklist" from start to finish.

How to Apply:

Please send a brief intro about your experience with physical products and logistics. Include a brief explanation of how you would calculate the dimensional weight of a 12lb box to save on shipping costs. Include any examples of AI-generated video or branding work.

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS 

Minimum 4+ years experience supporting executives, founders, or growth-stage brands

Advanced to Mastery-level English proficiency (written and verbal)

Bachelor’s Degree or higher required

Demonstrated success in pitching, outreach, or partnership development

Strong executive presence in written communication

Exceptional organizational and systems-thinking ability

Ability to work independently with minimal oversight

Experience managing multiple high-responsibility priorities simultaneously

High emotional intelligence and professional digital communication skills

Must be a woman or woman identifying (woman-led company seeking aligned team structure)



CORE EXPERTISE

Executive Calendar &
 Management

Lead Management & Strategic Pitching

Project Management & Task Coordination

Event Management & Marketing Support

Data Entry & Online Research

Systems Organization & Documentation

Partnership Relationship Management



BONUS EXPERTISE (PREFFERED) 

CRM software management and optimization

Basic bookkeeping or accounting familiarity

Travel planning and itinerary management

Media management & content production workflows

Graphic design fundamentals or creative direction support

Candidates with documented results (placements secured, contracts closed, partnerships developed) will be prioritized.



WORK EXPECTATIONS

Monday–Thursday (32 minimum hours) OR Monday - Friday (40 hours maximum) 

Responsiveness & engagement required between 6am–1pm PST (Seattle time) The other tasks are flexible with your time zone if you'd like.

24-hour advance notice required for time off

Consistent communication is mandatory

Failure to communicate for 48 hours during scheduled work time will result in termination

Integrity in time tracking and task execution is non-negotiable

This role is designed for experienced, self-led professionals who do not require micromanagement or frequent motivation.



COMPENSATION & PERFORMANCE STRUCTURE

$4–$5 per hour DOE

Performance bonuses tied to placements, contracts, and measurable growth outcomes

Efficiency bonuses tied to performance metrics

Loyalty-based pay increases

Overtime opportunities (pre-approved)

Holiday bonuses (after 3+ months)

Fully remote position

Payment Details:

Paid twice monthly (2nd and 4th Friday)

OnlineJobs.ph + PayPal

Monitask required (time tracking)



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Please submit:

Resume

Brief cover letter outlining relevant executive-level experience

Portfolio including:

Outreach and pitch examples

Documented results or placements secured

Content creation works

etc.



Podcast Screening: 2–3 customized podcast pitch
s for Manifesting Serenity and 3–5 aligned podcasts currently seeking guests

Founder
 Protection Exercise: Below is a simulated inbox snapshot. Draft responses and explain what you would escalate, delegate, or decline.



Inbox includes:

A podcast invite with no audience data

A speaking request offering “exposure only”

A brand collaboration with unclear compensation

A longtime subscriber asking for 20 minutes of “free advice”

A paid client needing urgent support

A vague partnership inquiry

Submit:

Drafted responses to each

What you would prioritize first and why

What you would bring to the founder vs. handle independently

Subject line must include: “Productivity Powerhouse”

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Please do not reach out outside OnlineJobs.ph unless invited to do so.



Role Evolution

1 Paid Project To Start (This will give us insight into how well we work together - before we continue on!)

2–4 weeks onboarding and systems training

3-month probationary review

6–12 month contract opportunity with structured performance review





I am building long-term infrastructure and visibility for this brand. I am seeking someone who takes ownership, executes strategically, and contributes meaningfully to scaling operations and public presence.

If you are confident in your ability to operate at an executive support level, I look forward to reviewing your application.



Best,

Serenity L.

CEO, Manifesting Serenity

title: Growth & Marketing Operator
description:
WordPress, SEO, CRM | Full-Time Remote | Long-Term Role | Australian Business



Davis Marine Brokerage is a premium boat brokerage and vessel management company based in Sydney, Australia.



We help clients buy, sell, and manage quality boats, with a strong focus on high service standards, presentation, and long-term relationships.



We are looking for a high-performing Filipino team member who is strong in WordPress, SEO, social media, CRM, and admin support.



This is not a basic VA role.



We are looking for someone who can take ownership, bring ideas, and help drive results.



Core Objective of the Role



Your role is not just to complete tasks.



Your role is to:



make the business more organised



make the business more visible



generate more opportunities (especially service work)



support sales by ensuring no lead or opportunity is missed



You will be expected to bring a plan, prioritise actions, and help drive results — not wait for instructions.



How your time will be spent



This role is focused on outcomes, not just activity.



40% Marketing



WordPress updates, SEO improvements, social media, content, listings



40% CRM & Lead Management



HubSpot updates, lead tracking, follow-ups, database use



20?min



Listings, contracts, invoices, and general support



What you’ll be doing

Marketing (focused on generating opportunities)



Manage and improve WordPress pages, posts, and listings



Improve on-page SEO (titles, meta, keywords, internal links, content structure)



Review SEO tools and identify issues and improvements



Create and schedule social media content 
, Instagram, LinkedIn)



Turn listings, past jobs, and database into marketing opportunities



Repurpose content into posts, reels, and updates



Recommend marketing actions to generate service work and leads



CRM & Lead Management (no missed opportunities)



Ensure every lead is captured, categorised, and followed up



Maintain a clean and organised HubSpot CRM



Track enquiries across all platforms



Support fast response times and follow-up workflows



Use the database to generate service opportunities



Admin



Assist with listings, contracts, estimates, and invoices



Maintain organised files, trackers, and records



Follow SOPs and improve systems where needed



Support general business operations



Must-have skills



Strong WordPress experience



Strong SEO understanding (on-page essential)



Strong social media content and scheduling



Excellent written English



High attention to detail



Strong organisation and admin skills



Ability to work independently and take initiative



Comfortable improving systems, not just following them



Big advantage if you have experience with



HubSpot



Podium



Canva



InShot or video editing tools



Ubersuggest



SEMrush



Zapier



Image optimisation and upload workflows



Marketplace listings / CMS / CRM systems



The kind of person we want



Proactive and solutions-focused



Fast and accurate



Highly organised



Strong communicator



Takes ownership



Notices problems early



Brings ideas and executes them



Can build a plan and follow through



What success looks like



Website and listings are clean, professional, and optimised



SEO basics are consistently handled



Social content is consistent and engaging



Leads are organised and followed up properly



Service opportunities are being generated



Admin tasks are completed accurately and on time



The business feels more structured, visible, and active



This role is NOT for you if:



You wait to be told what to do every day



You are only comfortable completing assigned tasks



You do not take ownership of outcomes



You are not confident making suggestions



Why join us



Long-term, stable role with an Australian business



Direct communication and support



Opportunity to grow with a premium brand



Interesting work in the marine and lifestyle space



Real responsibility for the right person



To apply



Please send:



A short introduction



Your experience with WordPress, SEO, social media, and CRM



Examples of your work (websites, posts, projects)



Tools you’ve used (HubSpot, etc.)



Your internet speed and setup



Your desired monthly salary



Include the words “Blue Water” in the first line



Bonus question



In 3–5 sentences:



How would you generate more service work and enquiries for our business in your first 30 days?

title: Editor (E-commerce Brand Experience REQUIRED)
description:
Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $3–$8+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $60 per video!!



- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (1-4 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $60 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $3-$8 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Script Writer
description:
Position: Daily Scriptwriter — Long-Form YouTube Content

Type: Full Time

Delivery: Daily (2 scripts per day)



About Us



We are a new YouTube channel that wants to produce high-quality educational content on current events, geopolitical trends.



Our goal is to deliver deep, engaging, and informative scripts that inform, educate, and retain audience attention from start to finish.



- sample videos: 
, 

Role & Responsibilities



As our Scriptwriter, you will:



Produce 2 daily scripts

Each script must be 2,000–2,500 words

Write in a professional, narrative, documentary style (voice-over ready)

Thoroughly research and fact-check all content

Craft compelling hooks, clear explanations, and logical story flow

Use a tone that’s informative, authoritative, and easy to follow

Deliver scripts on time, every day



What We’re Looking For



You are:



A strong writer with experience in research journalism or content creation

Comfortable writing long-form, structured, narrative scripts

Able to produce high-quality work under deadlines

Excellent at synthesizing sources into clear, original prose

Familiar with YouTube script style (hooks, timestamps optional, topic clarity)

title: Opus Pro Specialist & Video Editor (Short-Form Content Manager)
description:
We are looking for a tech-savvy, detail-oriented Video Editor and Content Manager to take full ownership of our TikTok content workflow. You will be responsible for transforming long-form video content into viral short-form clips using Opus Pro, refining those edits for quality, and managing the scheduling/posting across our accounts.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands the short-form video editing and is comfortable navigating opus pro. (Bonus points if you usually schedule the content you make)



Key Responsibilities

Opus Pro Management: Upload long-form videos to Opus Pro and manage the dashboard.



- Quality Control: Review all AI-generated clips. You won't just "accept" what the AI gives you; you will adjust framing, captions, and timing to ensure every clip is high-quality.

- Video Editing: Perform manual corrections (cutting out dead air, fixing caption errors, or adjusting B-roll) using your preferred software (CapCut, Premiere Pro, etc.).

- Posting & Scheduling: Handle the full scheduling and posting process on our TikTok/Social accounts.

Communication: Keep us updated on progress as we refine this new workflow together.



Required Skills & Qualifications

- English Fluency: Excellent written and verbal English skills are a must.

- Fluid Video Editor: You must be comfortable with video pacing, visual hooks, and making manual edits to AI-generated content.

- Opus Pro Familiarity: Experience with Opus Pro is a huge plus. We can provide training, but you must be tech-savvy and quick to learn.

- Reliability: Since this is a new project, we need someone dependable who can manage their hours effectively

Attention to Detail: To show you read this full post, please put the word "ORANGE" in the subject line of your application.



Working Hours & Duration

- Status: This is a new project. We aren't exactly sure how long it will take each day or how long the project will run, but we are starting with an assumption of 1-4 hours per day.

- Flexibility: As we grow, there may be opportunities for more hours.



How to Apply

To apply, please send a message with the following:



Portfolio: If you have any portfolio proof of your opus experience with please send it. If not a link to short-form videos (TikToks/Reels) you have edited. 

Tool Experience: Your level of familiarity with Opus Pro or other AI video tools.

Rate: Please state your desired hourly rate in USD.



If you have experience with Opus Pro please lead with that, those applications will be heavily prioritized

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.
