title: Appointment Setter - Sales
description:
Job Title: B2B Appointment Setter / Cold Caller (Base + Uncapped Commission) - EST Hours



About the Role:



We are a growing digital marketing and web design agency from Canada looking for a hungry, relentless, and highly motivated Appointment Setter. Your only job is to cold call local business owners in North America and book a 30-minute Zoom discovery call on our calendar.



You will not be closing deals. You are just pitching the meeting. We provide the lead lists, the dialing software, the script, and the objection-handling cheat sheet. You just need to bring the hustle and a great voice.



The Compensation Structure (The harder you work, the more you make):

We want you to win. We offer a highly competitive hybrid pay structure:



The Base: $3 to $5 USD per hour (depending on experience).



The "Show-Up" Bonus: $20 USD for every qualified prospect that actually shows up to the meetings with our founders / sales managers.



The "Closed Deal" Commission: If we close the deal from your meeting, you get a 10% bonus. (Example: If we sell a $3,000 USD website, you get a $300 USD bonus on top of your base and show-up fee).



High performance will make you eligible for salary increases.



Your Responsibilities:



Make 80 to 100+ outbound cold calls per day to local businesses.



Navigate gatekeepers to reach the decision-maker (Owner/Founder).



Deliver our proven script to generate interest.



Manage a simple CRM pipeline to track your calls and follow-ups.



Requirements:



Perfect English: You must have a clear, neutral accent. You will be speaking with North American business owners who have low tolerance for spam calls.



Timezone: Must be available to work during US Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours (approx. 9 AM to 5 PM EST).



Tech: A quiet workspace, a high-quality noise-canceling headset, and a fast, wired internet connection.



Experience: Previous outbound B2B cold calling experience is highly preferred. You must be comfortable with rejection and able to handle objections smoothly.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

We are looking for someone with high attention to detail. If you do not follow these exact steps, your application will be instantly deleted.



1. To prove you read this entire post, the very first word of your application message must be the word Mango.



2. Send a link to a 60-second voice recording of yourself (you can use 
). In the recording, tell us about your past sales/calling experience, and then read this exact sentence: "Hi John, I was looking for a electrician in your area today and found your business on the second page of Google. Are you currently taking on new clients?"



3. Attach your resume and briefly explain why you are the best fit for a heavy outbound calling role.



Notes:



1. Please use 5 AP if you think you are a good fit for this role.

2. We are willing to go up to 40 hours / month for exceptional candidates.



We are hiring immediately. Good Luck!

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $800–1,100 USD/month (based on portfolio & skills)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week), Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver (PST) overlap for feedback



---



THE VISION



Prismiera - luxury jewelry.



We're going to be building cinematic para-social content on Instagram/TikTok, with flexibility to pivot formats based on what the platform is rewarding. Realistic, stylized, dark feminine aesthetic, mythology underneath, luxury fashion on the surface. Think if a high-end fashion editorial had lore and a storyline.



The content follows a simple rhythm: our heroine talks to camera like a real person — casual, smart, magnetic — then something cinematic happens that changes everything you just saw. The audience replays it.



We're hiring for taste first, artistry, cinematography, humor, and technical execution. We provide all AI tools and training if needed. You bring the instinct.



THE CONTENT MIX



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption.

25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end execution of viral formats and humor. The premise can be unhinged; the visuals never break luxury canon.

10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. The algorithmic wildcard.



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Cinematic skits.



NO: Generic CapCut presets. Generic motivational reels. Anything made in Canva.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Produce original IG Reels and TikToks — parasocial content into cinematic reveal

- Build cinematic skits around our AI personas using trending formats and dark humor

- Integrate AI-generated characters into edits so they feel like they belong in the scene, not pasted on top

- Learn and use frontier AI generation tools (we provide paid accounts + training if needed)

- Music-sync editing — cuts married to the beat, rhythm as a storytelling weapon

- Design for platform behavior — what gets saved on IG, what loops on TikTok

- Ramp from 3–5 pieces/week to 6–10 at steady state



REQUIREMENTS



- Portfolio that makes us stop scrolling — we're evaluating taste, creative vision, and editing execution as a package. All three matter.

- Music-sync editing instinct (AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits — any genre)

- Work that has atmospheric, cinematic depth — layered compositions, light/shadow awareness, visual storytelling that goes beyond straight cuts and generic Capcut presets. Whether you achieve this in After Effects, Premiere, DaVinci, or anything else doesn't matter. The output is everything.

- Strong English, clear async communication, reliable deadlines

- Coachable — takes direct feedback and iterates fast



BONUS (affects your rate): After Effects proficiency, AI generation experience (Kling, Veo, Seedream), color grading, typography, sound design



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run your editing software and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



THE DEAL



- Paid trial: $150/week standard. For candidates with strong existing signal, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 for a single deliverable.

- All AI tool subscriptions provided

- Creative ownership from day one — you define how a luxury brand looks on social

- Direct feedback on every edit

- Rate growth tied to capability growth

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon, with two more AI-native brands incubating behind it



COMPENSATION: $800–1,100 USD/month based on portfolio and skills. Editors with compositing ability and AI generation experience start higher. Bi-weekly payments after confirmed hire.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite movie]

Use 7+ apply points.



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit that is aspirational, aesthetic, fashion-adjacent, or a skit showing platform-native instinct. The feeling and execution matters.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE music-driven edit. (Can overlap with #1.)



3. Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above that you are proud of, drop it here!



4. The Two-Act Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given footage of our AI heroine sitting in a dimly lit restaurant, a dark atmospheric beat, and her voice talking casually about something she noticed about the people around her. Act 1 is the conversation. Act 2 is the cinematic reveal. Pitch both halves — what does she say, what does the audience see, and what is the reveal? Humorous? Epic?



5. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). Your experience with generative AI tools. If none, let us know.



6. Hardware. CPU / GPU / RAM / upload speed.



7. Turnaround. Given existing footage, potential music track, and an established template — how long for a 15–20s piece? How long for a 45s stitched cinematic AI video?



8. The Rewrite. Make this dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Freelance Social Media content copywriter
description:
We’re Hiring: Freelance Social Media content copywriter (Freelance, Remote) 



Do you love experimenting with social media, bringing content to life in fun, creative ways? 



At Find Your Superpower, we help professionals build their personal brands and stand out online. Founded by LinkedIn Top Voice Dr Juliana Chan, our community has grown rapidly on LinkedIn and Instagram, and now we’re expanding into TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Threads, and Substack. 



We’re looking for freelance creatives to join our content pool. If you’re excited to repurpose content into scroll-stopping posts and short videos, we’d love to collaborate with you on a project basis.



What you’ll be doing:

- Repurpose existing content (LinkedIn posts, newsletters, long-form videos) into short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

- Use tools like CapCut (or similar) to cut, edit, and polish videos.

- Adapt content for new platforms like Threads and Substack, guided by best practices.

- Share ideas on how to make our content fresh, engaging, and platform-friendly. 



Who we’d love to work with

- You have an active presence on LinkedIn and/or Instagram (It doesn’t need to be big, just active).

- You’re curious about TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Threads, Substack (bonus if you’ve used them).

- You have basic video editing skills (CapCut equivalent or more).

- You’re reliable, responsive, and easy to collaborate with.

- Most importantly: you enjoy experimenting, sharing your ideas, and having fun with content.



Why join us?

- Work with Dr Juliana Chan, one of Asia’s top LinkedIn creators and branding coaches.

- Gain exposure to multi-platform content strategy.

- Be part of a diverse, friendly and flexible team spread across Asia.

- Enjoy the freedom of freelance work while contributing to meaningful projects.



Location: Remote (work from home)



Type: Freelance / Project-based (hourly or per project)



To apply:



1. Please review both of Juliana's Instagram 
 and LinkedIn account (
) and let us know whether the content suits you and why. 



2. Next, send us your CV plus links to your LinkedIn/Instagram profile (or any content you’ve created) when you apply to this post. If you have a short video or post you’re especially proud of, we’d love to see it!



*** NB: we can only consider applications that come with this information ***



—



About Us



Find Your Superpower is a Singapore-headquartered personal branding and leadership community, founded by LinkedIn Top Voice Dr Juliana Chan. Our mission is to help professionals activate their potential and stand out as thought leaders. We already run a thriving community on LinkedIn and Instagram, and now we’re ready to scale across Substack, YouTube, Threads, and TikTok.



We’re a fully remote team with colleagues across Singapore, Malaysia, the Philippines, and India, working alongside a wide network of freelancers and experts. Flexibility and collaboration are at the heart of how we work.

title: Property Coordination Assistant (AU Business Hours - Work From Anywhere - 6 Weeks Paid Recreation Time/Year)
description:
Apply here: 



What's in It for You

Competitive contractor rate — 90,000 PHP approx per month

100% remote full-time hours — work from home

Six weeks paid recreation leave

10 days paid rest leave

WFH Setup allowance

Be part of a high-performance, award-winning Australian team

Access to cutting-edge tools and technology

A team culture that invests in your growth — we genuinely want to see you win

Work alongside specialists, strategists, and leaders who move fast and think big



About Us

Hi! We're Dashdot and our mission is to transform the way the world invests. We help everyday Australians build wealth through smart property investment, and we're on a mission to make that accessible to more people than ever before.

We're proud of what we've built and the recognition that's come with it:

AFR Best Place to Work: Most Outstanding Practice – Employee Flexibility

AFR Most Innovative Company – Property, Construction & Transport

AFR 12th Fastest Growing Company in Australia

Deloitte Tech Fast 50 – Top 20

2025 Breakthrough Culture Award Winner



The Role

The Property Coordination Assistant is the operational backbone of Dashdot's Delivery team — keeping transactions moving, timelines on track, and nothing falling through the cracks. You'll work closely with our broader Delivery Team  to support the end-to-end property investment journey for our clients.

This is not a passive task-follower role. We're looking for someone who anticipates what needs to happen next, owns open loops without being told, and brings the energy of an EA with the precision of a project coordinator.

In this role, you'll own:

Coordinating multi-step property transaction timelines across multiple clients simultaneously

Liaising with external parties including real estate agents, inspectors, solicitors, and clients via
, Slack, and phone

Reviewing and cross-checking documents for accuracy, flagging discrepancies early

Proactively following up on outstanding items to keep transactions and onboarding timelines on track

Supporting Specialists and Strategists with administrative coordination so they can focus on delivering client outcomes

Maintaining accurate records and data across internal platforms



What Success Looks Like

Response times are consistently within KPI — nothing sits unanswered or unactioned

Zero errors in document checking, data matching, and follow-up coordination

Open loops are closed proactively — you follow up before being asked

Strategists and Specialists can rely on you to manage the admin without hand-holding

You're comfortable picking up the phone when it's the fastest way to move something forward



What We're Looking For

You'll need:

Sharp attention to detail — you catch what others miss and take pride in accuracy

Strong multitasking and coordination skills — you can manage multiple timelines and priorities without dropping the ball

Excellent written and verbal English — you communicate clearly and confidently with Australian clients, agents, and partners

Comfortable picking up the phone — when
 isn't cutting it, you make the call

A proactive, anticipatory mindset — you don't wait to be told; you see what's coming and move first

Confident using a range of software tools such as Airtable, Corelogic, Google Workspace, Slack, HelloSign

Resilience and adaptability — you stay calm and keep executing when priorities shift

Reliable computer, strong internet, and quiet home workspace

Bonus points if you have:

Experience in property, real estate, mortgage broking, or a related field

Background in event coordination, travel planning, or complex project administration

Prior experience supporting multiple teams or stakeholders simultaneously



This Role Is NOT for You If...

You need to be told what to do next — this role requires self-direction and proactive follow-through

You rely exclusively on
 and Slack and are uncomfortable picking up the phone

You get frustrated when priorities change or tasks don't follow a neat checklist

You prefer to work independently with no structured hours — core availability (aligned to Australian Specialist hours) is required



The Culture

At Dashdot, we cultivate a high-performance team culture grounded in Freedom and Responsibility — trusting our members to operate with integrity and uphold our values while striving for excellence. We recognise that our best work often happens when we have the freedom to support our personal needs while fostering an environment of extreme ownership and mutual respect.

We're not a traditional corporate team. We move fast, we challenge each other, we celebrate wins, and we grow together. If you're the kind of person who brings energy — not just effort — you'll fit right in. ????



Our Recruitment Process

We move quickly — here's what to expect:

Application review

Online activity (30 mins): A mix of skills questions and a short video intro so we can get to know you

Culture, traits & mindset interview (30 mins with People Operations team)

Technical interview (45 mins with Team Lead)

Offer



Ready to Apply?

If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you. Apply now via the link — we review every application personally.

?? A quick heads up: We use AI tools to support parts of our recruitment process, but every application is reviewed by our team and all hiring decisions are made by humans. We move fast, but we never lose the human touch. Questions? Just reach out.





Apply here:

title: E-commerce Product Specialist
description:
We operate three established and profitable e-commerce stores and are expanding our team to support growth and product excellence. We’re looking for an experienced, detail-oriented E-commerce Product Specialist who can manage product listings, perform web scraping, and help optimize our Shopify stores.



This is a senior-level role with long-term potential for the right candidate. PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION AND ANSWER ALL QUESTIONS FOR YOUR APPLICATION TO BE CONSIDERED.



Responsibilities -

• Manage and maintain product information across all stores: uploading new products, updating listings, and maintaining vendor databases.

• Coordinate with vendors to gather accurate product information, lead times, and order details.

• Research products and competitors to identify new opportunities and monitor performance metrics.

• Optimize Shopify listings for product rankings, conversion rates, and sales growth.

• Perform mass uploads and bulk changes to products efficiently.

• Quality-check product images, titles, descriptions, and specifications for accuracy.

• Collaborate with the team to resolve product and website issues promptly.

• Oversee inventory reconciliation and track stock levels.

• Document SOPs, maintain records of product performance, and suggest process improvements.

• Complete daily administrative tasks, including reports, logs, and operational updates.

• Manage assigned tasks proactively and independently, without needing follow-ups or reminders.



What You Need to Succeed -



Required Experience:

• 2+ years of Product Management or Product Specialist experience in an e-commerce environment.

• Proven hands-on experience with Shopify (being Shopify Certified is a plus).

• Strong attention to detail (include the word mushroom in your application).

• Comfortable handling multiple priorities in a fast-moving environment.



Technical Requirements:

• Proficiency with Shopify, ClickUp, Airtable, Google Workspace, and web scraping tools.

• Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills.

• A reliable computer and at least 20 Mbps internet connection.

• Backup solutions for both power and internet outages.



Work Style:

• Self-directed: takes initiative, owns tasks, and solves problems independently.

• Process-minded: documents and refines workflows naturally.

• Detail-oriented: accuracy is a priority.

• Customer-focused: product issues and feedback are opportunities to improve systems.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time, 40 hours/week

• US business hours: 9 PM–6 AM or 10 PM–7 AM PHT

• 1-hour break

• Five days per week



This Role Won’t Be a Match If:

• You need micromanagement or detailed daily task lists.

• You cannot work 9 PM–7 AM PHT consistently.

• You experience frequent power/internet outages without backup solutions.

• You view this as temporary income between other opportunities.



Before You Apply – Please Confirm:

• Weekly payments for the first 4 weeks (starting from week 3), then bi-monthly every other Tuesday.

• Full-time role, US hours.

• Must be open to a one-month trial period.

• Daily End of Shift (EOS) report answering:

  a) What did you do today? (detailed description)

  b) What issues did you run into?

  c) Anything you need help with?



If you agree to all terms, write “I AGREE TO ALL TERMS” and answer the questions below.

Application Instructions (Follow Exactly)

Subject Line:

[Your First Name] – I Am Your Product Specialist

Example: Kevin – I Am Your Product Specialist



Submit:

• Cover letter (focused on relevant e-commerce experience)

• Resume



Answer These Questions (Complete Sentences Required):

• What is your previous experience with managing products for e-commerce companies?

• List the tools/software you’ve used for product management, including web scraping, bulk uploads, or analytics, and explain how you applied them.

• Have you worked with Shopify before? Please describe your tasks.

• Are you currently engaged in another job or commitment?

• How fast is your internet (include a screenshot)?

• Do you have a reliable computer? Please share specs.

• How often do you experience power or internet outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for power outages?

• What backup solutions do you have for internet outages?



Important: AI-generated or template responses will be immediately disqualified. We are looking for thoughtful, specific answers that demonstrate you read and understood this posting.

title: Social Media Manager (Growth, Content, Engagement) – Multi-Brand Events
description:
We are looking for a high-level Social Media Manager to take full control of multiple event-based social media accounts (6–10 brands) and grow them into large, active communities that convert into real ticket buyers.



This is NOT a basic posting job.



We need someone who understands how to:



- Grow followers

- Create engaging content

- Interact with audiences

- Stay current with trends and conversations within each niche



---



Responsibilities:



- Manage and grow 6–10 social media accounts across:

  -

  - Instagram

  - TikTok

  - YouTube (Shorts)

  - Snapchat

- Post multiple times daily across platforms

- Create and edit content (images, reels, short-form video)

- Monitor trends, conversations, and viral content within each niche

- Adapt content to match what is currently relevant and engaging

- Respond to comments and messages daily

- Actively engage with followers and community members

- Participate in conversations within groups and communities

- Build relationships and increase audience involvement

- Maintain consistency and branding across all accounts

- Drive followers toward ticket purchases and event engagement



---



Primary Goal:



Build strong, active communities that:



- Engage daily

- Share content

- Convert into ticket buyers and attendees



---



Requirements:



- Proven experience growing and managing social media accounts

- Strong understanding of TikTok, Reels, and Shorts

- Ability to create engaging and relevant content

- Good video editing skills (short-form content)

- Ability to identify trends and apply them correctly to a niche

- Strong English communication

- Organized and able to manage multiple accounts

- Self-driven and does not require micromanagement



---



Work Style:



- Full ownership of social media

- Minimal oversight

- Expected to take initiative and stay ahead of trends

- Focused on results, engagement, and growth—not just posting



---



Compensation:



- $6–$11/hour (90-day probationary period)

- $11–$16/hour for high performance



Performance-based increases available quickly for strong results.



---



Hiring Timeline:



- Interviews will begin immediately (starting tomorrow through Saturday)

- We are looking to make a hiring decision by Sunday



---



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION TEST (REQUIRED):



To be considered, complete ALL steps below:



1. Include the word “ENGAGEMENT” in your application



2. Provide 2–3 examples of accounts you have grown (include links)

   

   - Briefly explain what YOU did to grow them



3. Content Creation Test:



You are managing a Reptile Expo event page.



Create:



- 2
/Instagram post ideas

- 2 TikTok/Reel ideas

- 1 engagement-focused post (designed to get comments/shares)



Include:



- Caption

- Content idea (what the post/video shows)

- Why it would perform well



4. Trend Awareness Test:



Explain how you would stay updated on what the reptile (or pet) community is currently talking about and how you would turn that into content.



5. Decision Test:



If a trending video format is going viral but doesn’t perfectly match our niche, explain how you would d
 whether to use it or skip it.



6. Additional Questions:



- What is your desired starting hourly pay?

- In 2–3 sentences, why do you want to work with us?

- What do you believe you can bring to our company?



---



Applications that are generic, copy-pasted, or lack detail will be ignored.

About Us:

We are an innovative and fast-growing rental car company based in Charlotte, NC, focused on providing gig workers with affordable, convenient, and no-hassle transportation solutions. Our leadership team is driven, ambitious, and passionate about achieving the company’s long-term vision of removing all barriers to affordable transportation. This role requires a proactive and adaptable individual ready to handle various responsibilities, including managing calendars, logging daily payments, sending payment reminders, creating and maintaining maintenance logs, receiving and making calls on the company’s behalf, and more. The right candidate will possess a “startup mindset”—enthusiastic, flexible, and eager to tackle new challenges head-on.



Responsibilities

 Management: Respond promptly to customer
s, ensuring timely and professional communication.

A positive attitude, adaptability, and a problem-solving mindset.

Experience in a startup or entrepreneurial environment is a plus.



Why Join Us?:

Be part of a fast-growing company with opportunities for advancement.

Competitive salary

Flexible work environment.

title: Online Deal Researcher & Content Uploader | Full-Time | Remote | 13th Month + Bonuses
description:
We are a leading U.S.-based lifestyle and shopping platform serving a large Asian-American audience. Our company is rapidly expanding, and we are building a top-tier team of E-Commerce Deal Researchers who will help millions of shoppers discover the best deals every day.



We are looking for smart, detail-oriented people who love online shopping, researching products, and finding great prices. If you’ve worked with Amazon sellers, online arbitrage, product sourcing, or e-commerce research, this role will feel natural to you.



This is a long-term, stable role with growth, bonuses, and an amazing team culture.





What You Will Do

• Search major online retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Target, Best Buy, Costco, etc.)

• Identify the best deals, trending items, and lowest-priced products

• Compare prices using simple tools (Keepa, Amazon price history, etc. — training provided)

• Upload deals into our custom CMS (simple workflow, not WordPress)

• Write short, clear English descriptions for each deal

• Track fast-moving deals and limited-time offers

• Follow daily content schedules and coordinate with our editorial team

• Help our audience save money by selecting only high-value deals





Ideal Candidate

• Experience with Amazon product research, online arbitrage, VA product sourcing, or e-commerce research

• Fast and accurate researcher

• Excellent English reading and writing skills

• Can spot good prices, high-demand items, and “hidden gem” deals

• Strong attention to detail

• Reliable, disciplined, and able to follow SOPs

• Stable internet and working computer

• Comfortable working at a fast pace during sales seasons (Prime Day, Black Friday)





Hours, Pay & Benefits

• Full-time — 40 hours/week, Monday–Friday

• Must be available during US Eastern Standard Time (EST)

• Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

• 13th month pay

• Paid vacation days

• Performance bonuses

• Long-term, stable employment with opportunities to advance

• Supportive, positive, fast-growing team





How to Apply



 your application to: 
 line: “[Your Full Name] – E-Commerce Deal Researcher Applicant”



Please include:

• Your resume

• Your answers to the questions below



Application Questions (Required)

 1. Do you have experience in Amazon product research, online arbitrage, or deal finding?

 2. How many hours per week can you work (minimum & maximum)?

 3. Can you work full U.S. EST hours?

 4. Describe your computer, internet speed, and headset.

 5. Please provide an example of your work.

 6. Why do you think you would succeed in this role?

 7. What is your expected monthly salary (PHP)?

title: Senior Data Analyst (AI BI Platform)
description:
About the Role



We’re building a state-of-the-art AI-powered BI and querying platform, and we’re looking for a Senior Data Analyst to play a critical role at the intersection of customers, data, and product.



This role owns the data funnel end-to-end — from building datasets and dashboards, to analyzing usage and results, to ensuring data quality for both customer-facing analytics and internal decision-making.



You’ll be the only dedicated data specialist on a 10-person team primarily based in the Philippines, supporting existing customers while also helping shape net-new platform functionality as we evolve our AI BI product.



This is a hands-on role for someone who enjoys both:



Supporting real customers with real data needs

Building modern analytics systems that scale and improve over time



What You’ll Do

Customer & platform analytics

Build and maintain datasets that power customer dashboards and analytics

Create dashboards and analyses used by customers and internal teams

Investigate data questions, edge cases, and inconsistencies from customer use cases



Data funnel ownership

Own the full data lifecycle: ingestion ? transformation ? modeling ? reporting

Ensure data quality, accuracy, and consistency across sources

Define and maintain metric definitions and business logic



Analysis & insights

Analyze customer behavior, platform usage, and performance trends

Identify insights that inform product decisions and prioritization

Communicate findings clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders



Product & tooling collaboration

Partner with engineering and product to support new AI BI functionality

Help shape how datasets, metrics, and querying work in the platform

Improve analytics workflows using modern tooling and automation



AI-assisted workflows

Use AI tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot and similar) to accelerate querying, modeling, and documentation

Apply judgment to validate outputs and ensure correctness in customer-facing data



What We’re Looking For



Core experience

5+ years of experience in data analytics, BI, or a closely related role

Strong experience building datasets and data models, not just consuming reports

Deep SQL experience and comfort working with cloud data warehouses

Proven ability to independently create dashboards, analyses, and insights

Experience being a primary or sole owner of analytics in a small team



AI & modern tooling (key requirement)

Strong experience using AI-assisted coding and analytics tools such as:

GitHub Copilot

Cloud-based code assistants

AI-driven query or exploration tools

Ability to use AI tools responsibly in production and customer-facing contexts



Nice to have

Experience with modern transformation tools (e.g., dbt or similar)

Experience with BI tools (Looker, Tableau, Power BI, Superset, etc.)

Exposure to analytics for SaaS products or customer-facing platforms

Familiarity with data quality checks, testing, or monitoring



Interest in AI-enabled analytics and next-generation BI products



What Success Looks Like

Customers trust and rely on analytics produced by the platform

Datasets and metrics are well-defined, documented, and reusable

Data issues are proactively identified and resolved

Insights meaningfully influence product and business decisions

Analytics keeps pace with rapid product development



Why This Role



High ownership and visibility across customers and product teams

Opportunity to shape analytics for a modern AI BI platform

Direct impact on customer experience and product direction

Work with cutting-edge AI-assisted analytics workflows

title: Pacific Admin Solutions LEGAL ADMIN ASSISTANT (Dictation Role 2)
description:
Rockstar Legal Admin Assistant Needed For Admin Company Servicing Employment Law Firm



Do you want to help top companies defend against Workers’ Compensation claims?



Then we need to work together ASAP.



Don’t miss this.

- Join a fast-growing company working with a top-tier law firm

- Be part of a fun, driven team

- Big opportunities will come from helping us grow

- Long-term position

- Be trained by the best in Workers Compensation defense - we’ll invest in training you

- Be empowered to make decisions

- Have the authority to direct your own path

- Work without being micromanaged

- Work from home

- Emphasis on relative work-life balance in the legal field

- Competitive salary



At Pacific Admin Solutions, we value each of our tea
mbers, and together, we join forces with a top notch law firm in implementing their legal strategies, resulting in out-of-the-box thinking and effective defense of Workers’ Compensation claims.



We work with dedicated and experienced Workers’ Compensation Defense attorneys who work as a cohesive unit to provide unrivaled representation for their clients. The law firm we work with defends every claim with the highest standards.



Our goal is to help our partner attorneys dedicate themselves to their clients’ defense and defend every claim with a unique approach and plan of action.



And to do that, we collaborate with clients to create and implement case specific strategies tailored to reaching favorable results. Come join us in making a difference.



This is a role that will require decision-making, responsibility and independence in your work. We need you to handle the review of attorney-client status letters, involving everything from checking grammar/punctuation of transcribed letters, to then drafting additional letters based on context, to ensuring that all other necessary tasks are being worked on. We want you to play a huge role in things moving forward.



This is an exciting long-term opportunity for you.



As you grow, the position can grow with you, based on your skills and interests.



Whichever direction your passion and talent take you, we’ll offer you training and mentorship so that you really can live up to your potential.



So, are you ready?



JOB OVERVIEW

Main Responsibilities:

- Reading and comprehending case status reports that have been dictated by an attorney, ensuring that there are no grammar and punctuation mistakes, and cross-referencing to make sure that all names are spelled correctly.

- Following attorney-transcribed instructions to draft any additional letters to different parties and making sure any action items are tasked and being worked on by others.

- Will need to be able to sift through large client files with speed and accuracy.

- Familiarity with law-related parties and terms is not required, but will most certainly help.

- Prioritizing urgent tasks and being able to triage work according to what should be completed first



We’re looking for someone who produces a high level of work with meticulous attention to detail. You will be given a certain amount of independence and responsibility to figure out what you need to do and to do it correctly.



Here are some specific examples of the tasks you’ll be handling:

- Going through a case status report - verbalized by an attorney into a 3rd party app/service, that has been transcribed by that service - to ensure that there are no spelling or grammatical mistakes, and that all party names are spelled correctly. The transcription service is fairly accurate, but there will be mistakes and it is your job to find them and clean up the mess.

- In addition to scanning the status report/letter for standard mistakes, you’ll also need to grasp the context of letter to understand what’s going on at a high level.

- You are going to be asked to prepare further correspondence with the various parties of the cases. These will vary from requesting medicals, prescriptions or MRIs from physicians to inquiring with the adverse attorney or co-party about settlement possibilities, to other legal process follow-ups.



Thanks for reading this far! To apply, as the title/header of your application response, please write "Pacific Admin Solutions’ Rockstar”. Also please send me a video introducing yourself (can be a link to a loom or YT vid) briefly discussing the hardest challenge you have faced and how you overcame it (custom, non-template video please). Make the video under 2 minutes.



DESCRIPTION OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

- Takes Pride in Mastering the Details

You have an eye for detail. When you say your work is correct, it’s correct. You cross all of your T’s and dot all of your I’s. You will double (or even triple) check your work to make sure that you did it the correct way.



- Listens To Instructions

Double checking your work doesn’t mean anything if you didn’t follow the correct instructions in the first place. You will listen (or read) to the instructions given to you, making sure that you understand the task at hand. And if the task doesn’t make sense to you, you won’t be afraid to ask to make sure you do the job correctly.



- Does the Job Right

You find a sense of accomplishment in ensuring that you do the job correctly, as you were instructed to do. If you have a question during the onboarding or learning process, you aren’t afraid to ask in order to make sure you do the job right.



- Works Well Independently and on a Team

You are able to take on a task when you aren’t given specific instructions for every single detail involved, and can use a higher level understanding to assume responsibility for the work and make proper decisions. At the same time, you are able to work seamlessly with others - you can exercise empathy and teach a teammate that needs help, and show a growth mindset that is receptive to feedback when learning from others.



- Gets Stuff Done

You take charge and get stuff done! You know you can ask for feedback and resources, but you don’t make excuses. You have a passion and an internal drive to make things happen!



- Self Starter

You’re self-motivated, happy working on your own with minimal guidance. You don’t understand why some people just sit there when they haven't been told what to do.



- Thrives With Hard Work

Some people shrink when given a big project. Not you - you say “bring it on!” It’s just one more opportunity to prove what you’re capable of.



- Solves Problems

Reason, logic, and process is your zone of genius. Your friends are often amazed at how you find solutions so quickly, often before they even realize there's a problem.



- Growth-minded

You’re always learning, always growing. If you weren’t, life would be stale and boring.



- Takes Ownership

You love to be in charge, and you want more responsibility. You’re confident to say, “let me handle this.”



- You Do What You Say

If you say you’ll do something, you’ll do it. And if you can’t do it, you’ll say you can’t. (Why do some people make promises they can’t keep?!)



- Pleasure To Work With

Life’s too short to work 
 looking for someone with a positive attitude who knows how to communicate with his/her coworkers.



COMPANY CULTURE

We're transparent; ask if something isn't clear, feel comfortable to express your difference of opinion. We work hard, we have fun, we believe in a fair work-life balance in the legal field.



PAY

Based on ability and experience, ranging from around 35,000-42,000 PHP per month, for this full-time role (depending on a combination of skills, ability and experience). If you believe you have more to offer, tell us what you’d like and why you’re able to deliver more value.



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

- Honest

- Reliable

- Hard working

- Attention to Detail

- Fluent in English (written and spoken), near native speaker

- Type 50 WPM

- Own computer capable of handling data entry apps such as adobe reader and excel

- Strong/reliable internet connection

- Good character - *will have to be willing to conduct a background check. This role involves work in the legal field, so you will be dealing with sensitive client and medical provider files.



Preferred:

- Microsoft Office and/or Adobe PDF experience



ADDITIONAL DETAILS

*REQUIRED:

- Internet: Fast, stable connection.

- Computer with sufficient specs to be able to handle adobe and microsoft suites (excel, word)

- Background check (no previous criminal background)



Work Environment: Be able to jump on a zoom video call with coworkers during business hours. Need to be able to respond to work-related chat/email communications in a timely manner.



WORKING HOURS

Full time position (40 hours/week): Working hours are ~Monday - Friday, 8AM - 4PM PHT time (with 2-3 hours on Saturday/Sunday mornings). For this position in particular, the days worked are as noted above, though there will be a lit of bit of flexibility in the tangential hours. PLEASE NOTE that your work days and hours may vary, especially during the initial training period, and/or when having to communicate/coordinate with other tea
mbers/clients.



HOW TO APPLY

Respond to the job post with your resume and any requested information.



We look forward to working with you!



Sean Rose

Pacific Admin Solutions

title: Supplier Performance Manager
description:
How to Apply

Send your resume to: 

Subject Line:

Supplier Performance Manager | [Your Name]

Include:

Relevant experience in procurement, planning, or supplier coordination

Language capabilities (especially Mandarin, if applicable)

Experience with supplier management, ERP systems, or container logistics







Supplier Performance Manager

Remote • Full-Time • 40 hrs/week

Start Date: March 10, 2026 • Paid Bi-Weekly



About American Hat Makers

American Hat Makers has been crafting and sourcing quality hats since 1972. We operate across multiple channels — direct-to-consumer, Amazon, wholesale, and major retail partners like Bass Pro Shops — supported by a global supplier network across China, Mexico, Ecuador, and other parts of Asia.

We are a fast-moving, family-owned company with high standards and a strong commitment to both product quality and our people.



About the Role

We are hiring a Supplier Performance Manager  to take full ownership of supplier execution — from purchase order issuance through production, quality control, and final delivery.

This role exists to eliminate surprises. Today, quality and timeline issues are often discovered too late — upon arrival in Texas instead of during production. Your role is to ensure that every product meets specifications and ships on time — 100% of the time.

This is a hands-on, execution-focused role, working closely with Operations, Purchasing, Sales, and suppliers.



Key Responsibilities

Supplier Communication & Accountability

Maintain proactive communication with overseas suppliers 
, video, messaging)

Confirm all PO receipts within 48 hours

Conduct structured mid-production check-ins and document findings

Manage sample review workflows (request, track, approve/reject)

Hold suppliers accountable for quality and timelines

Escalate risks or delays immediately



PO, Production & Delivery Tracking

Own and maintain the PO tracking system

Monitor production milestones: start, completion, shipment

Track all POs across their full lifecycle

Identify and resolve risks related to delays, quality issues, or non-responsiveness

Ensure all product specifications and timelines are clearly aligned with suppliers

Build buffer systems to prevent shipment delays



Supplier Performance Management

Ensure 100% product compliance with AHM specifications before shipment

Develop and track supplier performance metrics (quality & delivery)

Coach suppliers to improve performance and meet standards

Align supplier capacity with business demand

Support sourcing and vendor evaluation processes



Container & Inbound Logistics Management (Within 180 days)

Track inbound shipments using tools such as 

Monitor ETAs, port activity, and customs progress

Provide clear and timely container status updates

Flag delays, discrepancies, or risks immediately



Project Management & Cross-Functional Coordination

Manage multiple suppliers, POs, and timelines simultaneously

Maintain clear visibility of all open orders

Coordinate with warehouse and sales teams on delivery timelines

Build and document SOPs; continuously improve processes

Communicate updates proactively across teams



Data, Reporting & Compliance

Maintain accurate records: POs, samples, check-ins, shipments

Generate reports on supplier performance and order status

Ensure compliance with company policies and supplier agreements

Maintain documentation for certifications and procurement records



What You’ll Be Solving

Late discovery of quality and production issues

Poor visibility across supplier production timelines

Lack of structured mid-production quality checks

Gaps in container tracking and inbound logistics visibility

Weak supplier accountability between PO issuance and delivery



Requirements & Qualifications

Core Skills

Strong project management mindset (critical requirement)

Excellent supplier communication and accountability skills

Ability to manage multiple workflows and deadlines

Experience

1–5 years in procurement, supply chain, vendor management, or related roles

Manufacturing or e-commerce experience preferred

Technical

Proficient in spreadsheets, databases, and procurement systems

ERP system experience is a plus

Language

Fluent English required

Mandarin preferred (not required) for China supplier communication

Availability

Must work PST schedule initially, then adjust to China supplier time zones

Full-time commitment (not a side project)

Mindset

Detail-oriented, proactive, and highly organized

Strong follow-through and problem-solving ability

Able to hold suppliers accountable while maintaining relationships



Compensation & Details

Rate: $1000 - $1200 (based on experience)

Hours: 40 hrs/week

Pay Schedule: Bi-weekly (every 14 days)

Shift: Monday–Friday, starting 7:00 AM PST

Location: Remote

title: Capital Development and Funding Specialist
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a highly skilled Capital Development and Funding Specialist to support funding initiatives, capital sourcing, and strategic partnership efforts. This role focuses on identifying, pursuing, and managing funding opportunities that support organizational growth and long-term sustainability.



The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with grants, fundraising, capital development, investor relations, or strategic partnerships, and is comfortable working independently while collaborating closely with leadership.



Key Responsibilities



* Research and identify public and private funding opportunities, including grants, investors, lenders, and strategic partners

* Support the development and execution of capital development strategies

* Prepare grant applications, funding proposals, pitch decks, and supporting documentation

* Manage funding pipelines, timelines, and reporting requirements

* Coordinate post-award compliance, reporting, and documentation

* Maintain relationships with donors, investors, financial institutions, and partners

* Track deliverables, funding milestones, and deadlines

* Support negotiations, MOUs, and partnership discussions

* Provide regular updates and funding status reports to leadership



Qualifications



* Proven experience in funding, capital development, grants, or partnerships

* Experience working with U.S.-based funding sources

* Strong writing and communication skills (proposals, grants, reports)

* Excellent organizational and project management skills

* Ability to work independently and manage multiple funding initiatives

* Familiarity with compliance and reporting requirements

* Background in construction, real estate, development, or nonprofit is preferred but not required

* Experience with grant portals and CRM systems

* Financial analysis or budgeting experience

* Experience working with investors or lenders

* Understanding of funding compliance and documentation processes

title: Grant Writer – All You Need Services
description:
Position Overview

All You Need Services is seeking a skilled and motivated Grant Writer to join our team. This individual will play a critical role in securing funding opportunities to support the growth and impact of our projects. The Grant Writer will research, develop, and submit compelling grant proposals that align with our mission of providing construction, development, and community-focused solutions throughout Florida.



***Key Responsibilities***

*Research & Prospecting*

Identify federal, state, local, and private grant opportunities that align with company goals and services.

Maintain a database of prospective funding sources and submission deadlines.



*Proposal Development*

Write clear, persuasive, and well-structured grant proposals, applications, and supporting documents.

Tailor proposals to meet the requirements and priorities of each funding agency.

Collaborate with leadership and project managers to gather program details, budgets, and measurable outcomes.



*Budget & Compliance*

Work with the finance team to prepare grant budgets and ensure alignment with project needs.

Ensure compliance with grant requirements, regulations, and reporting standards.



*Reporting & Communication*

Track submitted proposals, pending requests, and awarded grants.

Prepare progress reports for funders, highlighting outcomes and impacts.

Communicate effectively with stakeholders, including county offices, partners, and funders.



*Capacity Building*

Assist in developing strategies to maximize funding opportunities.

Support the company’s vision of expanding services and community impact through innovative funding.



***Qualifications***

Bachelor’s degree in English, Communications, Business, Public Administration, or related field (preferred).

Proven experience in grant writing, fundraising, or proposal development.

Strong research, writing, and editing skills with attention to detail.

Ability to translate technical information into clear and persuasive narratives.

Familiarity with nonprofit, government, and private funding processes.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and online grant portals.



***Additional Skills***

Knowledge of Florida counties, municipalities, and permitting processes (preferred).

Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

Ability to work independently while meeting deadlines.

Commitment to the mission and values of All You Need Services.

title: Logo Vector Redraw, Refinement & Brand File Package
description:
Overview

We have an AI-generated combination mark for Crossroads Land Advisors, a professional land advisory firm. We're happy with the overall direction — the concept, colors, and general feel are approved — but we're open to thoughtful refinements before finalizing. We need someone who can redraw the logo in clean vector format, offer any professional recommendations for improvement, and then produce a complete brand file package.

This is primarily a production task, but we welcome your eye as a designer. If you see opportunities to improve balance, spacing, line weight, or proportions while staying true to the approved concept, please include those observations with your initial mockup before proceeding to final files.



The Logo

The combination mark consists of:



Icon: Three stylized evergreen trees in muted gold, rising from two crossed diagonal lines (roads) forming an X beneath them

Wordmark: "CROSSROADS" in large bold navy serif caps, with "LAND ADVISORS" in spaced, lighter navy serif caps below



Brand colors:



Navy: #1B2B4A

Gold/Tan: #B8966A

Cream (standard background): #F7F4EF





Deliverables Required

Please deliver the following variations in the file formats listed below.

Variations:



Stacked — Icon centered above wordmark; "CROSSROADS" at large display size, "LAND ADVISORS" in smaller spaced caps below

Horizontal — Icon to the left of wordmark; "CROSSROADS" and "LAND ADVISORS" at equal size, stacked as a unified text block

Icon only — The crossroads/tree mark with no text

Wordmark only (two versions) — One matching the stacked typographic treatment (CROSSROADS large, LAND ADVISORS smaller); one matching the horizontal equal-weight treatment

Dark background versions of all four above — reversed for use on navy or dark surfaces (gold icon, white or cream wordmark)



File formats for each variation:



.ai — Native Illustrator source file with global color swatches

.svg — Clean, web-ready vector

.pdf or .eps — Print-ready vector (your preference)

.png — Transparent background, minimum 1000px on longest side; 
 version



Please convert all wordmark typography to outlines in the final source files.



Our Proposed Process:



You redraw the icon and wordmark in vector

You send us a single mockup with any refinement suggestions noted

We review and approve (or request adjustments)

You deliver the full file package





What We'll Provide:



High-resolution PNG of the approved combination mark

Hex color values

Prompt responses and clear feedback





To Apply

Please include:



2–3 examples of similar logo cleanup or brand file production work

Your proposed timeline

Your fixed price quote for the full package



We communicate clearly, make decisions quickly, and pay promptly on delivery.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (Google + Meta Ads)
description:
About This Role

We're hiring a Digital Marketing Specialist to take ownership of Google and Meta Ads campaigns across a portfolio of client accounts. You'll be the person in the platform every day, building campaigns from the ground up, keeping budgets on track, and making the data-driven tweaks that turn good performance into great performance.



This is a hands-on execution role. You'll manage campaign lifecycles end to end, from setup and launch through to ongoing optimisation and reporting. If you're someone who gets satisfaction from a well-structured account, clean data, and campaigns that consistently hit their targets, this is for you.



Your Day-to-Day

You'll be responsible for building and managing campaigns across Google Ads (Search, Shopping, Performance Max, Display, remarketing) and Meta Ads (audience setup, placements, budgets, creatives, and A/B testing). On any given day, you might be launching a new campaign, adjusting bids and budgets to improve CPA or ROAS, reviewing performance data to spot what's working (and what's not), or pulling together a clear report for the team.



You'll also be the one making sure the details don't slip. That means keeping account structures clean, maintaining negative keyword lists and exclusions, managing audiences, and making sure tracking is accurate across GA4, GTM, and conversion actions. When something's off, you'll catch it early and either fix it or flag it.

Where relevant, you'll work with eCommerce campaign elements like product feeds, Shopping campaigns, and conversion value tracking.



What We're Looking For

You'll have at least 5 years of hands-on experience running campaigns across both Google Ads and Meta Ads. You're comfortable managing multiple accounts at once without dropping the ball on quality or detail. You know your way around bid strategies, audience targeting, and the optimisation levers that make a real difference to performance.



You're someone who reads data naturally and uses it to make smart decisions rather than guessing. You manage your time well across competing priorities, and when you communicate, you're clear and to the point, whether that's flagging a problem, sharing a result, or summarising what happened last week.



Bonus Skills

Experience contributing to campaign strategy, testing plans, or channel planning would be great. Familiarity with Looker Studio dashboards or Google Sheets reporting is a plus. eCommerce experience (Shopping, Performance Max, feed management, ROAS/MER tracking) is valued. Understanding of Google and Meta policy compliance, or exposure to SEO, CRO, or
/SMS marketing for broader context, would round things out nicely.



Tools

Google Ads, GA4, GTM, Merchant Center, Meta Ads Manager, Commerce Manager, Looker Studio, Google Sheets.



Engagement

Part-time, 70 hours per month, with NZ time zone overlap required.



How We'll Know It's Working

Campaigns are consistently well-built, optimised, and performing to target. Budgets are paced accurately with no surprises. Accounts are tidy with clean structures, current exclusions, and reliable tracking. Reports land on time with clear, useful takeaways. And when something needs attention, you've already spotted it.



Sound like you? We'd love to hear from you.

title: OPERATIONS SUPERVISOR!
description:
The Operations Supervisor serves as the central control point between Recruitment, Team Success, Client Growth, and active Virtual Assistants (VAs). This role ensures that VAs are deployment-ready, performance-aligned, properly trained, attendance-compliant, and operationally stable.



The Operations Supervisor upholds performance standards, identifies risks early, and resolves operational issues before they impact clients. This is a high-accountability role requiring decisiveness, strong systems thinking, and the ability to enforce structure while maintaining professional communication.



**Core Objectives**

* Ensure only qualified, performance-ready VAs are endorsed and deployed to clients

* Uphold operational discipline across attendance, reporting compliance, and KPI achievement

* Strengthen training frameworks to address recurring skill gaps and performance deficiencies

* Minimize escalations through proactive monitoring and early intervention

* Safeguard alignment with CBA operational standards and internal MT processes

* Optimize workforce allocation and redeployment to maintain stability, efficiency, and client continuity



# **Key Responsibilities**



## 1. Deployment Optimization (Internal EAs)

* Facilitate VA profiling in collaboration with the Team Success Manager upon receipt of new VA requests

* Assess VA eligibility for additional client assignments using established performance standards, including:



* KPI attainment and quota consistency

* Accuracy and reliability of End-of-Day (EOD) submissions

* Attendance track record and dependability

* Historical client feedback and performance evaluations

* Recommend deployment-ready candidates based on performance data, work ethic, communication quality, and behavioral indicators

* Secure onboarding confirmations and ensure attendance on scheduled deployment dates

* Notify Recruitment of paused VAs eligible for reassignment

* Provide insights to support workforce planning and manpower distribution



## 2. Training & Capability Development



* Lead structured Near Hire Training sessions to ensure deployment readiness

* Review assessments and formally endorse qualified candidates for client placement

* Oversee Refresher Training programs to close skill and performance gaps

* Partner with the Team Success Manager to identify Subject Matter Experts and high-impact training topics

* Deliver training sessions as needed to reinforce operational standards

* Identify recurring workflow gaps requiring targeted upskilling

* Design and develop structured learning modules, guides, and training materials

* Evaluate post-training performance to measure retention and operational improvement

* Maintain a centralized training tracker to monitor participation and measurable outcomes

* Recommend curriculum enhancements based on performance data and operational trends



## 3. Attendance Monitoring & Workforce Stability



* Serve as the primary authority for VA attendance oversight and compliance

* Monitor daily clock-ins, shift adherence, and attendance patterns

* Issue formal, documented warnings for excessive tardiness or unexcused absences in accordance with company policy

* Provide timely updates to Client Growth regarding attendance issues affecting clients

* Escalate chronic violations to the Operations Manager

* Maintain accurate documentation of attendance records and corrective actions



## 4. Client Service Pause Management

* Communicate service pause decisions clearly and professionally to affected VAs

* Collaborate with Team Success to identify redeployment opportunities

* Maintain engagement with paused VAs to preserve morale and readiness

* Track reassignment eligibility and reactivation timelines



## 5. Performance Management & Coaching

* Monitor daily, weekly, and monthly KPIs to ensure consistent performance attainment

* Enforce EOD reporting compliance and ensure submission accuracy

* Detect early indicators of underperformance through trend analysis

* Conduct structured coaching sessions and implement corrective action plans

* Clarify scope-of-work expectations to protect client satisfaction

* Escalate repeated performance concerns with proper documentation

* Maintain detailed performance records for audits and reviews

* Update FAQs, SOPs, and operational guidelines based on recurring challenges



## 6. System & Process Oversight

* Maintain comprehensive knowledge of company workflows and operational systems

* Enforce adherence to established processes and standards

* Identify inefficiencies, workflow gaps, and bottlenecks

* Recommend and document structured process improvements

* Safeguard data integrity across reporting and tracking systems



## 7. People Management & Escalation Handling

* Respond promptly to VA inquiries and escalations using structured problem-solving

* Reinforce accountability while maintaining professionalism

* Ensure proper documentation of concerns, actions, and resolutions

* Serve as the first line of operational resolution before escalation to senior leadership

* Foster a culture of discipline, clarity, and performance excellence



**Qualifications**

* **2–3 years of experience in Logistics and Executive Assistance**, with direct exposure to supporting leadership or senior management

* Proven experience in operations, workforce management, or team supervision

* Strong performance management and coaching capabilities

* Demonstrated ability to coordinate logistics, manage schedules, and support high-level stakeholders

* High attention to detail with strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills

* Ability to enforce standards while maintaining professional relationships

* Strong documentation, reporting, and process management skills

* Excellent communication, escalation handling, and conflict resolution abilities

* Experience in training facilitation and curriculum development is preferred



If you think you’re the one we’re looking for, kindly send us your updated CV along with a 1-2min self intro. Thank you!

title: Performance Video Editor – Meta Ads (DTC Brand, $150K+/mo Ad Spend)
description:
We're a US-based parenting education brand spending $200K+/month on Meta ads. We need a dedicated performance video editor who can produce 30–50+ ad variations per week from existing footage & sourced footage using CapCut.



This is NOT a creative/artistic editing role. This is high-volume, modular ad assembly — swapping hooks, bodies, CTAs, text overlays, and music to create dozens of structurally distinct ad variations from a library of raw footage components.



WHAT YOU'LL DO EVERY WEEK:

— Assemble 30–50+ Meta ad variations from modular footage (hooks, body clips, CTAs, B-roll)

— Add bold, scroll-stopping text overlays optimized for sound-off viewing (85% of Meta views are muted)

— Apply auto-captions with intentional styling (not default dumps)

— Swap hooks, CTAs, music, and pacing across variations

— Export in correct specs (9:16, 1:1, 4:5) with proper safe zones

— Organize and maintain our shared asset library

— Review ad performance data weekly and learn what's working (we share ROAS, CTR, hook rate, hold rate)



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

— 2+ years editing video ads specifically for Meta/Facebook/Instagram (not YouTube, not wedding, not film — META ADS)

— CapCut is your primary tool and you're fast in it

— You understand direct response: hooks, pattern interrupts, pacing, urgency, CTAs

— You can look at raw footage and see 10+ variations without being told

— You've worked with DTC or e-commerce brands before

— You understand that "ugly" authentic-looking ads outperform polished cinematic ads on Meta

— You're comfortable with repetitive, high-volume production work (this is assembly-line speed, not artisan craftsmanship)

— You can work independently from briefs with minimal revision cycles

— Reliable internet, own computer, available during US business hours overlap (at least 4 hours)



BONUS (not required):

— Experience with AI tools (Higgsfield, Kling, ElevenLabs) for lip sync or AI video

— Basic understanding of Meta Ads Manager (reading performance metrics)

— Experience adding film grain, compression artifacts, ambient audio to make ads feel organic



WHAT WE PROVIDE:

— Full organized asset library (hooks, bodies, CTAs, overlays all pre-sorted)

— Loom-based SOPs for every ad format we run

— Weekly performance data so you see which of YOUR edits are winning

— Reference ads and creative briefs for every batch

— Clear, fast feedback (no 5-day review cycles)

— Long-term role with growth path — editors who develop performance intuition get promoted to lead creative roles



HOW TO APPLY:

Do NOT just send your resume. To be considered, you MUST include:



1. A link to 3–5 Meta/Facebook/Instagram video ads you personally edited (not YouTube content, not reels for organic — PAID ADS). If they're in a portfolio, timestamp or label which ones are yours.



2. Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: "If an ad has a 50% hook rate but viewers drop off at the 5-second mark, what would you change in the edit?"



3. Your honest self-rating 1–10 on CapCut speed and proficiency.



4. Which brands have you worked with before in which role and at which ad spend levels?



Applications without all 3 items will be ignored. We review applications within 48 hours and top candidates will receive a PAID test task ($50 USD) using real footage from our brand.



This is a sensitive product category (child safety education) — the content is empowering and positive, not graphic. You should be comfortable editing content about keeping kids safe.

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.

Track package status in CRM tools

? 3–5 years of experience in fintech, banking, or credit card industry

? Experience reviewing borrower financials in a lending context

? Working knowledge of risk ratings, credit limits, KYC/KYB, and lending compliance



Candidates from general accounting, audit, or corporate finance backgrounds without credit underwriting experience will not be considered.



Ideal Background

Experience using fintech tools and CRM systems

title: WordPress Developer (Breakdance + Headspin)
description:
Please only apply if you are Filipino living in the Philippines!



Project role with potential long term position



We are a premium UK property company looking for a skilled WordPress developer to help restructure and standardise our website.



Our website is already live and built in WordPress using Breakdance and Headspin. We now have a new design ready, and the first phase of this role is to implement that design and bring consistency to the entire site both frontend and backend.



This role starts as a defined project, but if the collaboration works well it may develop into a long term development role including automation, integrations and system development.



Project Overview



Our website currently contains many pages built using Wordpress/Breakdance and Headspin, but pages were created over time and now need to be standardised.



Your first task will be to:



• Implement a new design across the website

• Standardise layouts and templates in Breakdance

• Organise and clean up Headspin components

• Ensure the entire system is structured and consistent

• Improve responsiveness and layout quality

• Ensure everything is maintainable moving forward



The goal is to turn the site into a clean, structured and scalable system.



Responsibilities



You will:



• Implement supplied designs across our existing WordPress site

• Rebuild layouts using Breakdance builder

• Create reusable templates and components

• Standardise styling using Headspin

• Improve responsiveness across devices

• Clean up inconsistent layouts and structures

• Ensure strong performance and maintainability



You should be comfortable reviewing an existing site structure and improving it methodically.



Technical Requirements



You must have strong experience with:



WordPress Development



• WordPress architecture

• Theme and template structure

• Performance optimisation



Breakdance Builder



• Building templates and layouts

• Reusable components and sections

• Clean page builder structure



Headspin Framework



• Design system structure

• Consistent component styling



Front End Development



• User Interfaces

• HTML

• CSS

• JavaScript



You should write clean, structured and maintainable code within Wordpress/Breakdance.



SEO and Performance Knowledge



You must understand how development affects SEO and performance.



Important areas include:



• Semantic HTML structure

• Page speed optimisation

• Mobile performance

• Core Web Vitals awareness

• Clean heading hierarchy

• Structured page layouts



The goal is a fast, search engine friendly website.



Working Structure



You will work directly with the CEO, who built and manages the current website structure.



Because of this, it is important that you can:



• Analyse an existing WordPress setup

• Ability to retain existing SEO with the new design

• Understand how the system currently works

• Identify inconsistencies and structural issues

• Implement improvements in an organised way



You should be comfortable reviewing and improving an existing architecture rather than starting from scratch.



Clear communication and attention to detail are important.



Future Opportunities



If the first phase goes well, the role may expand into ongoing development work including:



• WordPress feature development

• System integrations

• Automation workflows

• AI assisted tools and infrastructure



We are exploring tools such as:



• OpenClaw

• n8n automation

• Custom integrations



This role could grow into a long term technical position within our development ecosystem.



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



• Writes clean and organised code

• Understands structured systems

• Has strong attention to detail

• Communicates clearly in English

• Takes pride in producing high quality work



You enjoy turning messy systems into clean scalable platforms.



We are looking for a high quality developer.



To Apply



Please include:



• Links to WordPress websites you have built

• Examples of Breakdance work if available

• Your experience with CSS and JavaScript

• Your availability for this project



Please begin your application with the words:



Structure first



This helps us filter automated responses.
