title: Full-Time Content & Brand Growth Assistant (Social Media + Writing + Outreach)
description:
Do you want to work independently, side-by-side with a CEO, to help build an e-commerce brand?



Do you want the opportunity to grow with a small company, to have the potential to greatly influence the trajectory of a business?



Do you like the idea of being creative in your work? Does having the option to pick and choose your tasks for the day excite you? Do you want a job with variety, stability and growth, where you will have impact?



If so, we want you to apply!





We are looking for a long-term content-focused assistant to help grow a premium e-commerce brand in the intimacy / relationship education space.



This role is ideal for someone creative, emotionally intelligent, independent, and comfortable working in adult-adjacent content that must remain tasteful, subtle, and platform-safe.



The product is designed for beginners exploring trust, connection, and sensuality, so understanding how to communicate suggestive ideas without triggering platform restrictions is extremely important.





Main Responsibilities:



- Create faceless social media content for TikTok, Instagram, X,
, YouTube, and Pinterest



- Write captions that fit brand tone and platform style



- Repurpose content to post in different formats across different platforms 



- Generate original content ideas independently



- Edit short-form content using Canva, CapCut, or similar tools



- Write blog posts related to intimacy, trust, beginner exploration, and relationship topics



- Research and help identify affiliate / influencer partners



- Assist with outreach messages and creator follow-up



- Gradually become a brand expert and understand what content performs best





Ideal Candidate:



- Comfortable working in adult-adjacent / intimacy-related content



- Strong initiative — able to think ahead and propose ideas



- Can follow direction well without taking feedback personally



- Emotionally intelligent writing style



- Understands subtle, tasteful communication



- Understands platform restrictions surrounding adult/explicit content and creates content that avoids platform suppression 



- Organized and reliable



- Interested in long-term growth with a brand





Tools / Experience with at least some of the following:



- Canva



- CapCut



- Basic AI writing tools



- Social media scheduling tools (optional)





Work Structure:



-  Full-Time (40 hours per week, flexible work schedule)



- Long-term role



- Starting pay $600/month for one month trial period (paid weekly for first 30 days, bi-weekly after)



- For the right candidate, salary will quickly jump to $800/month (within 3 - 6 months)



- Yearly salary increase based on performance



- 13th month earned after first year of work





Important:



This role is not for a generic VA.



We are looking for someone who can eventually think like part of the brand, not just complete tasks.





To Apply Please Answer These Questions/ Prompts:



1. What social media content have you created before? Please provide examples.



2. Give 3 TikTok ideas for our brand.



3. Identify 3 potential affiliates for our brand and draft an outreach message for 1 of them.



4. What makes content feel emotionally engaging instead of generic?



5. How would you go about producing content for our brand? (Hint: platforms have restrictions)



Responding to these prompts will require some research into our brand. Please explore our social media pages (TikTok, Instagram) to get an idea of what sort of content we are looking for.

s sent, responses, meetings booked, referrals generated

title: Operations Support Coordinator
description:
Role Description:

The Operations Support Coordinator is the digital role for Seal’em Solutions. This offsite role focuses on the seamless execution of the "pre-job" and "post-job" lifecycles. By leveraging digital plans, CRM data, and real-time communication, this role ensures that quotes are issued accurately, schedules are optimised, and every client or subcontractor enquiry receives a professional, same-day response. You provide the critical administrative infrastructure that allows our field teams to focus exclusively on-site execution.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities:

1. Digital Estimation & Quote Generation

• Virtual Quoting: Prepare and send professional, accurate quotes based on digital assessments, photographs provided by clients, or standard schedules of rates.

• Plan Scaling & Take-offs: Instead of physical site visits, use architectural drawings and site plans to perform digital take-offs and measurements for quoting.

• Pipeline Management: Systematically follow up on all sent quotes via phone and
 to secure bookings and maintain a high conversion rate.

2. Strategic Scheduling

• Remote Dispatch: Manage and optimise the daily schedules for all applicators and subcontractors using GPS and CRM data to minimize travel time.

• Logistics Coordination: Book and confirm site inspections and touch-ups, ensuring all parties (builders and clients) are notified of confirmed requirements via
/SMS.

• Site Readiness Checks: Contact site supervisors 24 hours after full completion of jobs to ensure that all works has been completed.

3. High-Touch Communication & Responsiveness

• Same-Day Mandate: Monitor and address all incoming phone calls, voice messages, and
s within the same business day.

• Virtual Front Desk: Act as the primary remote point of contact for builders and residential clients, upholding the company’s reputation for elite service.

• Subcontractor Support: Act as the remote helpdesk for field teams, providing them with job details, product specifications, or client contact info as needed.

4. Real-Time Tracking & Compliance

• Compliance Repository: Remotely manage and verify mandatory documentation, including National Police Checks, White Cards, and site induction records for all field staff.

________________________________________

Required Skill Set & Qualifications:

Technical & Software Proficiency:

• Google Workspace / MS Office: High competency in Excel (for rate calculations) and Teams/Outlook for communication.

• Digital Plan Reading: Ability to read and interpret architectural plans and use digital scaling software to provide accurate estimates.

• Zoho Ecosystem: Advanced proficiency in Zoho CRM to manage leads, EOIs, and project tracking.

Soft Skills & Core Competencies:

• Exceptional Responsiveness: A disciplined, "Zero-Inbox" mindset for daily communication.

• Spatial Intelligence: The ability to visualize site challenges from photos or drawings without being physically present.

• Problem-Solving: Ability to re-route teams and solve scheduling conflicts remotely under pressure.

Mandatory Requirements:

• Reliable High-Speed Internet: Essential for CRM and plan-loading.

• Quiet Home Office Environment: Professional setting for handling high-volume client calls.

title: E-commerce Virtual Assistant (Shopify, Product Listings, AI, Social Media) – Only Experienced Operators
description:
IMPORTANT: Only apply if you have proven experience working with Shopify stores and managing product listings, AI tools, and daily e-commerce operations. Beginners will not be considered.



We are looking for a high-level Virtual Assistant to join a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the US market.



This is NOT a basic VA role. We are looking for someone who thinks like an operator and takes ownership.



Main responsibilities:



* Creating and managing high-converting product listings (Shopify)

* Generating product images using AI tools (Midjourney, Gemini, etc.)

* Uploading and organizing products (descriptions, variants, pricing)

* Basic social media management (posting, scheduling, content handling)

* Communicating with suppliers

* Supporting day-to-day store operations



Requirements:



* Proven experience with Shopify (must)

* Experience with product listing creation (must)

* Experience with AI tools for images/content (must)

* Strong understanding of e-commerce operations

* High ownership mentality (you take responsibility, not just tasks)

* Fluent in English



Bonus:



* Experience with social media management

* Experience in US market brands

* Understanding of DTC brands



To apply, follow ALL steps exactly. Applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.



*Start your application with the word: OPERATOR



*Send 1-2 REAL Shopify product listings and images you personally created

(include links + clearly explain what YOU did)



*Record a Loom video (max 2 minutes) answering:

- What is your exact experience with Shopify stores and operations?

- What tools do you use for product listings and AI images?



*What is your expected hourly rate?



We are looking for someone long-term. If you perform, you will grow with the company.

title: Social Media Manager for Real Estate (Part-Time / Remote)
description:
Role Overview

We are a growing Real Estate business looking for a proactive, tech-savvy Social Media Manager to elevate our digital presence. This isn't a "clock-in, clock-out" role; we value results and creativity over hours spent. You will be responsible for managing our social platforms, running targeted ad campaigns, and staying ahead of real estate marketing trends.



Key Responsibilities

Content Management: Create and schedule 6 high-quality posts per week across our platforms (Instagram,
, Tiktok). Content will be a mix of images and short-form videos.



Production: Perform basic video editing using CapCut and graphic design via Canva. (Note: We provide the raw text/assets, but we need your "eye" for the final polish.)



Paid Media: Set up, monitor, and optimize Meta Ad Campaigns specifically targeting Property Listings, Seller Leads, and Landlord acquisitions.



Strategy & Growth: Actively propose trendy marketing ideas and growth strategies. We want someone who doesn't just "post" but thinks about how to win.



Performance Tracking: Monitor account analytics and provide brief weekly updates on performance.



Workflow: Complete all weekly tasks independently. No required daily hours—as long as the content is live and the ads are performing, your schedule is yours.



Requirements

Real Estate DNA: Previous experience working within the Real Estate sector is a must.



Meta Expert: Deep familiarity with Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager.



Creative Suite: High proficiency in Canva (design) and CapCut (video editing).



AI-Enhanced: Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.) to streamline content creation and copywriting.



Multi-Tasker: Proven experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously without losing quality.



Preferred Qualifications

Availability or overlap with the UK Timezone (GMT/BST) for easier communication.



What We Offer

True Flexibility: Work whenever you want, from wherever you want.



Growth Potential: As the business grows, your role and compensation have the potential to expand.



Creative Freedom: We value fresh ideas and will give you the room to experiment with new trends.



How to Apply

Please send your portfolio (specifically highlighting real estate work) and a brief summary of your experience with Meta Ads to:



????

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Virtual Assistant for Client Communications (BPO/Call Center Experienced)
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our team. The ideal candidate must possess excellent communication skills, with a neutral or American/British English accent, and be adept at managing client/partner relationships. This role requires adaptability, strong negotiation skills, and the ability to handle multiple tasks in a fast-paced environment.



Key Responsibilities:



- Perform accurate data entry and maintain records.

- Conduct detailed web searches to gather relevant information.

- Build and maintain strong relationships with vendors, partners and clients (no cold calling).

- Make outbound calls to negotiate and secure agreements.

- Handle and prioritize multiple tasks efficiently to meet deadlines.

- Collaborate with tea
mbers to ensure smooth workflows.



Qualifications:



- Previous experience in a BPO or call center environment is required.

- Exceptional communication skills with a neutral or American English accent.

- Strong negotiation and interpersonal skills.

- Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously with attention to detail.

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently.

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment.



Work Schedule:



US Eastern Time (Exact schedule to be discussed) - full time 



Application Instructions:



To apply, please record a quick video of yourself answering the following questions (please do your best using a US accent):

1. How many clients do you currently have? How many hours per week do you work with them?

2. We're looking for someone to work US hours. Does that work for you?

3. What interested you in this position? What are you looking for in your next opportunity?

4. Do you consider yourself an entrepreneur? Why? If yes, please give an example.

5. Do you consider yourself a risk taker? Why? If yes, please explain.

6. Do you consider yourself to be hard working? If yes, give an example that shows your work ethic.

7. What motivates you most in your life? Why?

8. Which do you value more - money or growth? Why?

9. Describe one of your favorite clients. Why were they your favorite?

10. What's one of the biggest challenges you've overcome in your life?

11. Is there anything else you think I should know about you?



Applications without the video described above will not be considered.



We look forward to hearing from you!
